A newly-created state program next year will begin notifying residents when a jail or prison break has taken place in their surrounding area. The "Escaped Convict Alert Program," set to launch across Ohio next year, automatically will send notifications to smartphones, similar to Amber Alerts. Ohio State Rep. Bill Roemer, who sponsored the bill that was approved by the General Assembly earlier this year, emphasized the ease of the system. "You won't have to sign up for this," he said. "You will receive the notifications from your smartphone. We want to make it as easy as possible." Fairfield County has had a similar alert system in the works for residents who've signed up to receive alerts through the county's emergency management agency. "The more information, the more transparency that we can communicate and get information off, the better everybody is," Fairfield County Sheriff Alex Lape said. Under the new program , if there is an escape from a county jail or state prison, administrators will notify Ohio Public Safety , and an alert will be issued to a specific area surrounding the escape location.The new law was signed by Gov. TEL AVIV, Israel — A rabbi with a blowtorch climbs onto a scissor lift and is hoisted up to a giant Hanukkah menorah. Rabbi Shaul Reizes uses the blowtorch to light the first, rightmost candle and leads the children and a crowd of grownups assembled behind them at Habima Square in Tel Aviv in singing the Hanukkah blessings. It was at a ceremony like this one, thousands of miles away in Australia, where two gunmen opened fire on Sunday, killing, including a 10-year-old girl and a Holocaust survivor. The tragedy is casting a heavy shadow over the Jewish festival of lights in Israel, where people of all ages had been looking forward to celebrating — especially this year, as a ceasefire in Gaza has held since October andA large menorah stands outside the walls of the Old City in Jerusalem, ready for daily ceremonies to light the candles every night. title: Atlantic City Mayor Marty Small child abuse trial: Closing arguments
content: Deliberations are underway in the child abuse trial of Atlantic City Mayor Marty Small. The fate of Atlantic City Mayor Marty Small hangs in the balance as his child abuse trial reaches its closing arguments. The prosecution began their closing argument by stating, "Abuse is not parenting. " They allege that the mayor's teenage daughter was fearful of her father due to physical abuse, including an incident where she was reportedly beaten with a broom. Prosecutors presented photos of bruises on the teen's face and body as evidence. The defense, however, urged the jury to find Small not guilty, calling the allegations false. They argued that there was no physical evidence of abuse, such as marks or concussions, despite the teen's claims. The defense also highlighted text messages from the teen to her mother, suggesting the allegations were an attempt at extortion.Small's defense team emphasized his role as a city leader but stated, "He has no power here today... you do." They argued that the case is not one of genuine child abuse, but rather "extortion by the child." The defense presented statements from the teen to police, where she reportedly said, "No abuse. I'm mad. What I said is not true. I'm not abused. I don't get hit." The prosecution countered by asserting that the evidence is against Small, describing him as a "career politician" trying to cover up his actions. They claim the mayor asked his daughter to change her story, which she refused to do. Court on Tuesday was...

title: White House Ballroom Update: Donald Trump Scores Legal Win in Preservation Lawsuit
content: A federal judge signaled he is unlikely to halt work on a planned $300 million White House ballroom amid a preservation lawsuit. A federal judge in Washington said Tuesday he is unlikely to order the Trump administration to immediately halt work on a planned $300 million White House ballroom, as he considered a lawsuit alleging the project exceeds presidential authority. U.S. District Judge Richard Leon made the comments during a hearing on a request by the National Trust for Historic Preservation for a temporary restraining order to stop construction at the site of the former East Wing. The group’s lawsuit accuses President Donald Trump and federal agencies of beginning the 90,000-square-foot project without required legal reviews or approvals. Trump has made significant changes to the White House since returning to office in January, including installing gold-colored decorations in the Oval Office and paving over the Rose Garden lawn to create a patio modeled after his Mar-a-Lago estate in Florida. The proposed ballroom would be far larger than those alterations. Work continues on the construction of the ballroom at the White House, Tuesday, Dec., 9, 2025, in Washington, where the East Wing once stood. Images of heavy machinery demolishing the White House’s 120-year-old East Wing drew criticism from preservation advocates, who say the administration moved forward without proper oversight. The lawsuit argues that no president is permitted to remove parts of the White House...

title: METRO RTA workers threaten strike over contract dispute
content: METRO RTA workers are threatening to strike unless their contract demands are met, which could halt bus service in Akron. AKRON, Ohio - METRO RTA workers are threatening to strike unless their contract demands are met, which could halt bus service in Akron. John Samuelsen, international president of the Transport Workers Union, said more than 310 Metro RTA employees haven’t received a raise in two and a half years. The workers, part of TWU Local 1, have been operating without a contract for nearly a year and a half. “The demand is that we come to contract settlement or we’re going to continue to negotiate towards strike action,” Samuelsen said.Samuelsen said METRO RTA is making unreasonable demands during negotiations. “There are heinous demands coming from the employer. The employer wants a 300% increase in health benefit contributions. Absolutely outrageous. No raise. Inflation is rampant. Our cost of living has gone up and up and up,” Samuelsen said.“We’re doing the best we can to provide service for the citizens of Akron and the region. But our patience has now worn thin,” Samuelsen said. The more than 310 employees include bus operators, vehicle service workers, and customer care employees.METRO remains committed to bargaining in good-faith negotiations with our TWU Local 1 team members, as frequently and readily as the legal process allows. The Unemployment Rate rose above the FOMC’s December projections but failed to boost the chances of a rate cut at the January 28 meeting.The US Dollar Index , which measures the American currency against six others, is virtually flat at 98.21, a headwind for the EUR/USD advancement.Recently, Atlanta Fed President Raphael Bostic was hawkish and said that he would have left the fed funds rate unchanged at the December meeting.At the time of writing, the swaps...

title: Trump expands travel ban: new restrictions target 20 nations over security concerns
content: The proclamation comes following the shooting of two National Guard soldiers with the suspect being an Afghan national over Thanksgiving Day Weekend. by ELAINE MALLON | The National News DeskFILE - President Donald Trump signs executive orders in the Oval Office on January 20, 2025. The Trump administration placed travel bans on individuals coming from five additional countries and imposed partial entry limits on foreigners from 15 countries in a proclamation signed on Tuesday. Individuals from Burkina Faso, Mali, Niger, South Sudan, Syria, and individuals with travel documents issued by the Palestinian Authority face “full restrictions and entry limitations” to the United States. Travelers from Angola, Antigua and Barbuda, Benin, Cote d’Ivoire, Dominica, Gabon, The Gambia, Malawi, Mauritania, Nigeria, Senegal, Tanzania, Tonga, Zambia and Zimbabwe seeking entrance into the United States are subjected to partial entry limits.by members of the Trump administration and Republican lawmakers to place greater restrictions on who is allowed entrance into the United States. The Trump administration stated that countries added to the travel ban or placed on greater restrictions face “widespread corruption, fraudulent or unreliable civil documents and criminal records” which creates greater challenges for the United States to properly vet individuals, and accused some countries of having high rates of individuals staying past their visa expiration date. The proclamation also said that...

title: Kumble: ಹ್ಯಾಶಿಶ್‌ ಆಯಿಲ್‌ ಸಹಿತ ಇಬ್ಬರ ಬಂಧನ
content: ಕುಂಬಳೆ: ಅಮಲು ಪದಾರ್ಥವಾಗಿರುವ ಹ್ಯಾಶಿಶ್‌ ಆಯಿಲ್‌ ಸಹಿತಇಬ್ಬರನ್ನು ಕುಂಬಳೆ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಬಂಧಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕುಂಬಳೆ ಸಮೀಪದ ಆರಿಕ್ಕಾಡಿ ಲಕ್ಷಂವೀಡುಕಾಲನಿ ನಿವಾಸಿಗಳಾದ ಮೊಹಮ್ಮದ್‌ ಫಸಲ್‌ ಯಾನೆ ಫಾಹು ಯಾನೆ ಕಂಡನ್‌ ಫಸಲ್‌(40) ಮತ್ತು ಈತನ ಹತ್ತಿರದ ಸಂಬಂಧಿಕನಾದ ಅಬ್ದುಲ್‌ ನಿಝಾರ್‌ ಯಾನೆ ಇಚ್ಚಾದ್‌(23)ನನ್ನು ಬಂಧಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಬಂಧಿತರಿಂದ 7.4 ಗ್ರಾಂ ಹ್ಯಾಶಿಶ್‌ಆಯಿಲ್‌ ವಶಪಡಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಡಿ.15 ರಂದು ರಾತ್ರಿ 7.30ಕ್ಕೆ ಪುತ್ತಿಗೆ ಮುಗು ರಸ್ತೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ನಡೆಸಿದ ಕಾರ್ಯಾಚರಣೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಈ ಇಬ್ಬರು ಆರೋಪಿಗಳನ್ನುಬಂಧಿಸಿ ತಪಾಸಣೆ ನಡೆಸಿದಾಗ ಹ್ಯಾಶಿಶ್‌ ಆಯಿಲ್‌ ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಯಿತು. ಪೊಲೀಸರ ವಾಹನವನ್ನುಕಂಡೊಡನೆ ರಸ್ತೆ ಬದಿಯಲ್ಲಿದ್ದ ಮೊಹಮ್ಮದ್‌ ಫಸಲ್‌ ಹಾಗು ಅಬ್ದುಲ್‌ ನಿಝಾರ್‌ ಓಡಿ ಪರಾರಿಯಾಗಲುಯತ್ನಿಸಿದ್ದರು. ಇದರಿಂದ ಸಂಶಯಗೊಂಡ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಅವರನ್ನು ತಡೆದು ನಿಲ್ಲಿಸಿ ತಪಾಸಣೆ ಮಾಡಿದಾಗಹ್ಯಾಶಿಶ್‌ ಆಯಿಲ್‌ ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಯಿತು. ಬಂಧಿತ ಮೊಹಮ್ಮದ್‌ ಫಸಲ್‌ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಕಾಸರಗೋಡು, ಕುಂಬಳೆ ಸಹಿತ ಹಲವು ಠಾಣೆಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಕಳವುಪ್ರಕರಣಗಳು ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದೆಯೆಂದೂ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ತಿಳಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
creator: team udayavani

title: Kasaragodu ವಿಭಾಗದ ಕ್ರೈಂ ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳು
content: Kumble: ಗಾಂಜಾ ಸಹಿತ ವೃದ್ಧನಸೆರೆ ಕುಂಬಳೆ:ಮಾರಾಟಕ್ಕೆಂದು ದಾಸ್ತಾನಿರಿಸಿದ್ದ ಎರಡು ಕೆಜಿ ಗಾಂಜಾ ಜತೆಗೆ ಬಂದ್ಯೋಡುಅಡ್ಕ ನಿವಾಸಿ ಅಬ್ದುಲ್ಲ (61) ಎನ್ನುವ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿಯನ್ನು ಅಬಕಾರಿ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಮಂಗಳವಾರ ಮಧ್ಯಾಹ್ನ ಬಂಧಿಸಿದರು. ದ್ವಿಚಕ್ರ ವಾಹನದಲ್ಲಿ ಗಾಂಜಾಸಾಗಾಟ ಮತ್ತು ಮಾರಾಟ ನಡೆಯುತ್ತಿದೆಯೆಂಬ ಸುಳಿವು ಆಧರಿಸಿ ದಾಳಿ ನಡೆಸಿದ ಕುಂಬಳೆ ಅಬಕಾರಿ ರೇಂಜ್ಇನ್‌ಸ್ಪೆಕ್ಟರ್ ಕೆ. ವಿ. ಶ್ರವಣ್ ನೇತೃತ್ವದ ಅಬಕಾರಿ ದಳದ ತಂಡ ಆರೋಪಿಯನ್ನು ಬಂಧಿಸಿದೆ. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- Kasaragodu: ರೈಲು ಹಳಿ ಬಳಿಪರಿಚಿತ ಅಪರಿಚಿತ ಮೃತ ದೇಹ ಪತ್ತೆ ಕಾಸರಗೋಡು: ತಾಯಲಂಗಾಡಿ ಪಳ್ಳಂ ರೈಲು ಹಳಿಯ ಸಮೀಪ ಅಪರಿಚಿತ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿಯ ಮೃತದೇಹ ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಗಿದೆ. ಮಂಗಳೂರಿಗೆ ಪ್ರಯಾಣಿಸುವ ರೈಲುಹಳಿ ಬದಿಯಲ್ಲಿರುವ ವಿದ್ಯುತ್‌ ಕಂಬದ ಸಮೀಪ ಮೃತ ದೇಹ ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಗಿದೆ. ಸಾವಿಗೀಡಾದ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿಗೆ52 ವರ್ಷ ಅಂದಾಜಿಸಿದ್ದು, ಮೂರು ದಿನಗಳ ಹಿಂದೆ ಸಾವಿಗೀಡಾಗಿರಬೇಕೆಂದು ಶಂಕಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಕಾಸರಗೋಡುಪೊಲೀಸರು ಮೃತದೇಹವನ್ನು ಜನರಲ್‌ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಯ ಶವಾಗಾರದಲ್ಲಿರಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಪ್ರಕರಣ ದಾಖಲಿಸಿತನಿಖೆ ನಡೆಸುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ಬಸ್‌ಗಳು ಢಿಕ್ಕಿ :ಹಲವರಿಗೆ ಗಾಯ ಕಾಸರಗೋಡು: ಕಾಂಞಂಗಾಡ್‌ ಅಲಾಮಿಪಳ್ಳಿ ಹೊಸ ಬಸ್‌ನಿಲ್ದಾಣದಲ್ಲಿ ಎರಡು ಕೆ.ಎಸ್‌. ಆರ್‌.ಟಿ.ಸಿ. ಬಸ್‌ಗಳು ಪರಸ್ಪರ ಢಿಕ್ಕಿ ಹೊಡೆದ ಪರಿಣಾಮವಾಗಿ 12ಮಂದಿ ಪ್ರಯಾಣಿಕರು ಗಾಯಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
creator: team udayavani

title: ತಲೆಮರೆಸಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದ ಆರೋಪಿ ಸಾವು: ಕೋರ್ಟಿಕ್ಕೆ ಮರಣ ಪ್ರಮಾಣ ಪತ್ರ ಸಲ್ಲಿಕೆ
content: ಬೆಳ್ತಂಗಡಿ: ಕರ್ತವ್ಯ ನಿರತ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಸಿಬಂದಿಯ ಮೇಲಿನ ಹಲ್ಲೆ ಪ್ರಕರಣಕ್ಕೆ ಸಂಬಂಧಿಸಿದತಲೆಮರೆಸಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದ ಆರೋಪಿ‌ ಮೃತಪಟ್ಟ ಹಿನ್ನೆಲೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಆತನ ಮರಣ ಪ್ರಮಾಣ ಪತ್ರವನ್ನು ನ್ಯಾಯಾಲಯಕ್ಕೆಹಾಜರುಪಡಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಧರ್ಮಸ್ಥಳ ನಿವಾಸಿ ಬಾಲಕೃಷ್ಣ ರಾವ್ ಆರೋಪಿಯಾಗಿದ್ದು, ಧರ್ಮಸ್ಥಳ ಠಾಣೆ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿಯಲ್ಲಿಕರ್ತವ್ಯ ನಿರತ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಸಿಬಂದಿಗೆ ಹಲ್ಲೆ ನಡೆಸಿದ ಆರೋಪದಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಕರಣ ದಾಖಲಾಗಿತ್ತು. ಬಳಿಕ ಆತನ್ಯಾಯಾಲಯಕ್ಕೆ ಹಾಜರಾಗದ ಹಿನ್ನೆಲೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ವಾರಂಟ್ ಜಾರಿಯಾಗಿತ್ತು. ಆತನ ಪತ್ತೆಯ ಕುರಿತು ಬೆಳ್ತಂಗಡಿ ಡಿವೈಎಸ್ಪಿ ರೋಹಿಣಿ, ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಇನ್‌ಸ್ಪೆಕ್ಟರ್ ರವಿಬಿ.ಎಸ್., ಪಿಎಸ್ಐ ಸಮರ್ಥ್ ಅವರ ಮಾರ್ಗದರ್ಶನದಲ್ಲಿ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಸಿಬಂದಿ ವೃಷಭ ಹಾಗೂ ಚರಣ್ ರಾಜ್ ಅವರುಉಡುಪಿ, ಪುತ್ತೂರು, ಚಿಕ್ಕಮಗಳೂರು ಅಂಚೆ ಉಪವಿಭಾಗಗಳಿಗೆ ಭೇಟಿ ನೀಡಿ ಮಾಹಿತಿ ಸಂಗ್ರಹಿಸಿದ್ದರು. ಆತನಿಗೆ 1997ರಲ್ಲಿ ಚಿಕ್ಕಮಗಳೂರು ಅಂಚೆ ವಿಭಾಗದಿಂದ ಕಡ್ಡಾಯ ನಿವೃತ್ತಿ ನೀಡಿದ್ದು,2007ರ ಫೆ. 12ರಂದು ಮೃತಪಟ್ಟಿರುವ ಕುರಿತು ಮಾಹಿತಿ ಲಭ್ಯವಾಗಿತ್ತು. ಈ ಹಿನ್ನೆಲೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಧರ್ಮಸ್ಥಳಪೊಲೀಸರು ಆತನ ಮರಣ ಪ್ರಮಾಣ ಪತ್ರವನ್ನು ಬೆಳ್ತಂಗಡಿ ನ್ಯಾಯಾಲಯಕ್ಕೆ ಹಾಜರುಪಡಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
creator: team udayavani

title: Padubidri: ಬೈಕ್ ಡಿಕ್ಕಿಯಾಗಿ ವೃದ್ಧ ಸಾವು
content: ಪಡುಬಿದ್ರಿ : ಎರ್ಮಾಳುವಿನ ಮದ್ಯದಂಗಡಿ ಎದುರು ರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯಹೆದ್ದಾರಿ 66 ಬದಿ ನಿಂತಿದ್ದ ಅಣ್ಣಯ್ಯ ಬಂಗೇರ (67) ಎಂಬವರಿಗೆ ಮಂಗಳವಾರ ಸಂಜೆ ಬೈಕೊಂದು ಢಿಕ್ಕಿಯಾಗಿ ಗಂಭೀರ ಗಾಯಗೊಂಡು ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆಸಾಗಿಸುವ ದಾರಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಸಾವನ್ನಪ್ಪಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಬೈಕ್ ಸವಾರ ಹಸನ್‌ಎಂಬವರೂ ತೀವ್ರ ಗಾಯಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದು ಅವರನ್ನೂ ಉಡುಪಿಯ ಖಾಸಗಿ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ಸೇರಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಹಸನ್ ಕಾಪುವಿನಿಂದಕುಳಾಯಿಯತ್ತ ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾಗ ಈ ಘಟನೆ ಸಂಭವಿಸಿದೆ. ಹೆದ್ದಾರಿ ದಾಟಲು ನಿಂತಿದ್ದ ಮಲ್ಪೆ -ತೆಂಕ ಎರ್ಮಾಳು ನಿವಾಸಿ ಅಣ್ಣಯ್ಯ ಬಂಗೇರ ಅವರು ಹಾಗೂ ಬೈಕ್‌ ಸವಾರ ಕೂಡಾ ಢಿಕ್ಕಿಯ ರಭಸಕ್ಕೆರಸ್ತೆಗೆ ಅಪ್ಪಳಿಸಲ್ಪಟ್ಟಿದ್ದರು. ಘಟನಾ ಸ್ಥಳಕ್ಕೆ ಪಡುಬಿದ್ರಿಪೊಲೀಸರು ಆಗಮಿಸಿ ಪರಿಶೀಲಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.

title: Barcelona vence o Guadalajara em jogo de 'sustos' e aguarda sorteio das oitavas da Copa do Rei
content: O Barcelona venceu o CD Guadalajara nesta terça-feira (16), por 2 a 0, no pequeno Estádio Pedro Escartín, a cerca de uma hora de Madrid, em jogo válido pela terceira fase da Copa do Rei . O técnico holandês Hansi Flick levou a campo uma escalação mista, com nomes como Lamine Yamal e Ter Stegen, atual goleiro reserva, de titulares. Os gols foram marcados por Andreas Christensen e Marcus Rashford . Relacionado PSG domina seleção masculina do Fifa The Best, e Barcelona comanda melhor time feminino de 2025 ESPN.com.br Raphinha recebe 17 votos para melhor jogador do mundo no The Best da Fifa; veja quem votou ESPN.com.br Em quem Ancelotti e Marquinhos, da seleção brasileira, votaram para melhor do mundo no The Best da Fifa ESPN.com.br A vitória por dois gols de diferença não reflete exatamente o que foi a partida, que contou com chances perigosas do time mandante e pouca eficácia do Barça. O próximo adversário do Barcelona na Copa do Rei, nas oitavas de final, ainda será definido por sorteio. O jogo O primeiro tempo começou de maneira curiosa. Aos quatro minutos, Manu Ramírez arriscou de longe e tentou encobrir Ter Stegen. O goleiro alemão foi rápido para voltar ao gol e fazer a defesa. Um minuto depois, foi a vez de Eric García chutar de ainda mais longe e quase marcar de cobertura. Dani Vicente fez a defesa em dois tempos. Em seguida, só deu Barcelona. O time catalão chegou com perigo cobranças de falta de Rashford e Bardghji, em chute de fora da...

title: Slegers: Arsenal top 4 UWCL spot not in our hands
content: are targeting a spot in the top four of the Women's Champions League table ahead of Wednesday's trip to Belgium to face OH Leuven. The reigning champions currently sit in eighth place -- which would put them into a playoff -- with only the leading four teams qualifying directly for the quarterfinals. But the standings could not be closer, with Arsenal only one point behind in fourth going into the final round of group matches. Renee Slegers' side are on a good run, having won all their matches in December so far, and the Dutchwoman said: "Five games this block in different competitions and the first three games we're of course happy with the results, and now we go into tomorrow. "It's an important one for us, it's the last one in the Champions League and we go for three points. It's not within our hands but we'll try to chase those top four positions. "But Leuven will have to go for something as well so it's going to be an interesting game. All games will be played at the same time so scenarios can change in an instant." Disney+ becomes new home of Women's Champions League in Europe Visit the Disney+ website to get access. Leuven are not yet guaranteed a spot in the playoffs as the last side in the top 12. face fourth-placed Juventus away with boss Marc Skinner looking to bounce back from one-sided defeats to Wolfsburg and Lyon in their previous European games. title: Garnacho double sends Chelsea to Carabao semis
content: Alejandro Garnacho scored twice as Chelsea reached the semifinals of the Carabao Cup with a 3-1 victory at Cardiff City. Substitutes Garnacho and Pedro Neto struck second-half goals as Chelsea unleashed the power of their bench against their Welsh hosts. David Turnbull had equalised after 75 minutes -- his first goal for 13 months -- to give renewed hope to the last EFL team in the competition. But Neto spared Chelsea's blushes eight minutes from time with a low drive and Garnacho put the seal on victory for the five-time winners in stoppage time. Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca changed the entire line-up from the team that had started Saturday's home victory over Everton . Moisés Caicedo returned after serving a three-game domestic ban, and Enzo Fernández , João Pedro , Neto and Garnacho were among those on a bench that cost nearly £400million and considerably more than the starting XI. Cardiff were buoyed by five successive wins that had taken them four points clear at the top of League One and had already claimed one top-flight Carabao Cup victim, having beaten Burnley in round three. The Bluebirds' last victory in a rarely played fixture had come in this competition way back in October 1986. Chelsea had won the subsequent five meetings by the comprehensive margin of 16-5, but Cardiff were backed by their first full house since being relegated from the Premier League in 2019. Cardiff showed their intent within seven minutes as a cross proved just too high for Callum Robinson...

Báo Philippines bi quan: ‘Đánh bại đội tuyển nữ Việt Nam, viết nên cổ tích là điều không dễ’
content: Trận chung kết môn bóng đá nữ SEA Games 33 sẽ diễn ra tại Chonburi (Thái Lan) lúc 19 giờ 30 hôm nay 17.12. Với đội tuyển nữ Việt Nam, đây cũng là lần thứ 11 liên tiếp chúng ta góp mặt trong trận chung kết SEA Games. Trong 10 kỳ đại hội trước đó, đội tuyển nữ Việt Nam cũng 8 lần giành HCV và chỉ có 2 lần thất bại (đều thua Thái Lan, ở các kỳ SEA Games năm 2007 và 2011). Nếu giành được tấm HCV SEA Games 33, đội tuyển nữ Việt Nam sẽ chính thức phá sâu kỷ lục của chính mình với 5 lần vô địch liên tiếp. Phía đối diện, đây là lần đầu tiên đội tuyển nữ Philippines góp mặt ở chung kết SEA Games. Một ngày trước khi màn so tài giữa hai đội diễn ra, trang Abante của Philippines nhận xét: “Một làn sóng hân hoan, bùng nổ tại nước ta đã diễn ra sau khi đội tuyển nữ Philippines đánh bại Thái Lan trên chấm phạt đền. Việc có mặt ở chung kết cũng đảm bảo cho chúng ta có thành tích tốt nhất từ trước đến nay tại SEA Games. Tuy nhiên, đối thủ của đội tuyển nữ Philippines là các cô gái Việt Nam - đội có số lần vào chung kết gấp 10 lần chúng ta. Để đánh bại đội tuyển nữ Việt Nam, giành HCV thật sự là điều không hề dễ dàng, các cầu thủ Philippines phải nỗ lực và quyết tâm hơn 100% khả năng của họ”. title: 汪志雄觀點:民粹總統,台灣悲歌
content: ​ 立法院三讀通過的《財劃法》及公教年金修法, ​ 賴清德總統與行政院決定以「不副署、不公布」的方式, ​ 沒收立法院的三讀條文,引起輿論熱議。 ​ 民主,從來不是情緒的出口,更不是「我覺得不服就推翻」的工具。 ​ 民主是一套制度,而這套制度的核心精神,便是代議政治下的「 ​ 多數決」原則。 ​ 賴清德總統就任以來,面對朝小野小, ​ 台灣國會愈來愈常見一個弔詭現象:投票時高喊「民主至上」, ​ 表決結果卻只有在「符合黨立場」時才被認可;一旦結果不如黨意, ​ 便指控制度失靈、程序不正義、違憲, ​ 甚至訴諸民粹要求推翻既有決定。這樣的民主, ​ 還算是真正的民主嗎? ​ 代議政治的本質,在於人民透過選舉,將治理權力授權給民意代表, ​ 並在議會中以制度化方式進行討論、協商與表決。多數決並非完美, ​ 但它是現代民主社會中,被反覆驗證是最可行、 ​ 最能避免暴力與獨裁的決策方式。民進黨否定多數決, ​ 就等同否定代議政治本身;而否定代議政治,民主便只剩下口號。 ​ 有人以為,「多數不一定代表正義」, ​ 因此拒絕接受立法院的表決結果。這句話在哲學上或許成立, ​ 但在政治實務上卻荒謬至極。 ​ 民主制度本就不是用來保證每一項決定都「絕對正確」, ​ 而是要確保權力可以被制衡、錯誤可以被修正。若每一個掌權者, ​ 都自以為擁有「更高道德」,都可以否定程序結果, ​ 那麼最後的裁決者將不再是制度,而是誰的聲音大、誰的動員力強、 ​ 誰更能夠煽動民粹,其結果就是政治動盪,社會不安, ​ 國家走向一個「類獨裁」的民主空殼。 ​ 更讓人詬病的,是執政黨對多數決的「選擇性尊重」。 ​ 當綠營在國會占多數時,多數決是「民主的展現」; ​ 當綠營失去多數,多數決立刻被貶為「暴力表決」、「程序霸凌」、 ​ 「違憲越權」。這種雙重標準,暴露的不是對民主的堅持, ​ 而是對權力的依戀。民主若只有在「對自己有利」時才被承認, ​ 那麼本質上已與威權並無二致。 ​ 當然,捍衛少數權益同樣是民主的重要一環。但捍衛少數, ​ 並不等於否定多數決,而是透過憲法保障、制度救濟、 ​ 公開辯論與下次選舉來爭取翻轉。民主社會提供的是「 ​ 持續說服的權利」,而不是「拒絕服從制度的特權」。 ​ 把街頭動員當成凌駕議會的最終裁決, ​ 只會讓民主政治退化成群眾政治,最終滑向民粹的深淵。 ​ 歷史一再證明,民主最脆弱的時刻,往往不是被坦克輾過,而是被「 ​ 只有黨才是民主進步」的話術慢慢侵蝕。當程序不再被尊重、 ​ 當輸的一方拒絕承認結果,民主制度就開始空轉, ​ 社會信任也會隨之崩解。 ​ 真正成熟的民主,不在於永遠贏,而在於輸得起。 ​ 一個政黨願意接受多數決的結果,持續在制度內奮戰, ​ 這才是民主最艱難、也最可貴的修養。如果賴清德政府連最基本的「 ​ 代議政治多數決」都不願遵守,那麼民進黨所高喊的民主進步, ​ 恐怕是自欺欺人了! *作者為 美國伊利諾芝加哥大學教授 ​ (相關報導: 風評:這樣的賴皮政府,非換掉不可 | 更多文章 )
creator: 汪志雄

title: 呂紹煒專欄:從全球政治經濟退卻中的歐洲
content: 上月歐盟輪值主席國提出新提案,要把《歐盟零毀林法案》( EUDR )延後 1 年實施,雖然看似一件「技術性」的小事,但一葉知秋,這件「小事」正好可看出、甚至「彰顯」歐洲在全球政治、經濟事務上的退卻。 EUDR 是歐盟在 2023 年通過的法案,曾經被視為是一項里程碑政策,目的是消除與歐盟森林砍伐相關的商品,法規針規範牛隻、可可、棕櫚油、橡膠、豆製品、木材等七種商品和其衍生相關商品,要求要在歐盟市場銷售的這些產品,必須證明其產品不涉及森林砍伐。 這是一個旨在促進永續發展和永續供應鏈的法案,藉著對砍伐森林的約束,保護環境並有利因應氣候變遷的減碳大業,一言以蔽之,就是對環境生態「愛到最高點」,而且歐盟要「推己及人」,那些把這 7 項產品賣進歐盟的多是開發中國家。 換句話說,這個法令骨子裡不是用來約束歐盟國家不要亂砍伐森林,而是用來約束那些開發中國家,從亞洲的印尼到拉美的巴西、阿根廷再到非洲國家,這些國家都向歐洲出口咖啡、可可、牛肉、木材 ...... 。講白點,這是歐盟某種型式的「長臂管轄權」,雖然遠比美國那種鴨霸、更強制性的長臂管轄權「溫柔」不少,但也是意圖以歐盟自身訂定的法令,影響與干預其它國家的行為。 過去數十年,歐洲一定程度上就是以類似方式,引領甚至主導全球的經濟、產業、思潮等,想想那些環保、減碳、綠能、各種更嚴厲的監管,當然還有許多「覺醒文化」,那個不是歐盟引領、主導?有不少「全球規範」都曾經是歐盟率先訂定與實施,例如:汽車紅燈時的怠速熄火、機車的大燈不熄等充滿「理想與環保」的標準,都是從歐盟訂定開始而為其它國家採行。 不過,現在看起來曾經有的「布魯塞爾效應」的影響力,已經逐漸退卻甚至消失。這次,那些開發中國家群起抗議就讓歐盟的 EUDR 一延再延,去年說延後到今年底實施,現在又要再延後 1 年實施。 情況雷同的還有其它,例如,曾經雄心萬丈、要引領全球減碳與綠能大業的歐盟,訂出 2035 年停售燃油車的政策,但如今,雖然尚未宣布延後達成目標,但也已經沒有人認真看待這個政策目標。再如曾經在清潔能源上占盡先機、引領全球的歐洲,現在已不得不承認在這個領域,歐洲已經被中國超越。 今年 5 月時,財經專業外媒《華爾街日報》就曾以一個產業血淋淋的案例說明歐洲的沒落,報導說「馬斯克的 SpaceX 在一天之內成功將 28 顆衛星送入軌道,這是美國今年逾 100 次成功的軌道發射之一」, 1 月以來「中國已將 40 餘枚火箭送入太空」,甚至連陷入戰爭泥沼的俄羅斯也發射了 10 枚火箭,而歐洲僅發射 4 火箭,歐洲一直依賴 SpaceX 來發射關鍵基礎設施。這篇文章的標題正是毫不客氣的「數讀歐洲的衰落」。 當然,拉長時間看,歐洲的衰落已走了十多年以上,以歐盟經濟龍頭德國而言,其經濟規模較 2017 年末僅增長了 1% ,而同期美國經濟增長了 19% ;如果拉長時間看可能更「不堪」,依照 IMF 的數據, 1990 年歐盟 GDP 佔全球約 25% ,到 2024 年降至 14% 左右;自 2008 金融危機以來,歐元區年均成長率約在 1-1.5% 之間,同期美國約爲 2.3% 、中國爲 6% 左右。 只是在「跨大西洋關係」仍穩固時,歐美聯合頗有「共治天下」之觀感,但川普 2.0...
creator: 呂紹煒

title: 林騰鷂觀點:少數不願服從多數,圖窮匕見的憲政流氓行徑
content: 民主政治最基本、也最不可動搖的原則,是少數服從多數。 這不是政治口號,而是憲政運作的根本邏輯。然而, 賴清德總統與行政院長卓榮泰,面對國會朝小野大的政治現實, 竟以「不副署、不公布、甚至副署但不執行」作為政治對抗工具, 公然拒絕執行立法院三讀通過的《財政收支劃分法》, 這是赤裸裸的憲政流氓行徑! 卓榮泰指控立法院「立法獨裁」,更是顛倒民主制度的荒謬說法。 立法院是典型的合議制機關,在制度設計上根本不可能形成獨裁。 真正具備獨裁風險的,是首長制、是行政一體、命令貫徹的行政權。 行政院長實際掌握軍隊、警察、情治系統、 文官體系與龐大預算資源,如此龎大集中的權力, 拒絕接受國會監督,拒絕服從民主多數,最會造成真正的獨裁! 又卓榮泰為拒絕副署所提出的「五大理由」, 在憲法與法律上均屬錯置與誤導! 其一,指控財劃法修正案「違憲增加預算」, 刻意混淆憲法第七十條的適用範圍。該條所限制的, 是立法院在審議「行政院所提年度預算案」時不得增加支出, 而非禁止立法院制定制度性財政法律。財劃法屬於財政體制立法, 而非預算案,兩者界線清楚,硬要混為一談,無異於指鹿為馬。 其二,行政院宣稱財劃法修正,違反《公共債務法》, 同樣站不住腳。 公共債務法第六條規範的是行政機關在舉債接近上限時的自我節制義 務,約束的是行政院如何編列預算、如何舉債, 而非剝奪立法院決定稅收與財政分配制度的權限。更諷刺的是, 行政院自己也承認,若不舉債,仍可透過刪減中央歲出因應, 顯示所謂「債務失控」根本是政治話術,而非法律必然。 其三,卓榮泰指控財劃法侵害行政院對地方補助的裁量權, 援引憲法第147條與地方制度法, 卻刻意忽略憲法第107條與第111條的明文規定。中央財政、 國稅及稅收劃分,本即屬中央立法事項;中央與地方權限爭議, 依法更應由立法院以法律加以解決。 而財劃法正是立法權核心職能的展現! 其四,行政院聲稱修法「影響施政彈性、窒礙難行」, 更是把政治不便包裝成違憲理由。憲法增修條文早已設計覆議制度, 正是讓行政院表達反對意見的正式管道;但覆議既已提出, 且遭立法院否決,行政院長依憲應即接受該決議。施政不便, 從來不是違憲,拒絕執法的正當理由! 其五,也是最荒謬的一點,卓榮泰竟將「不副署」 描繪為捍衛憲政秩序的正當手段。事實恰恰相反, 因為在我國修憲後的雙首長制下, 行政院長的副署早已不是政治否決權, 而是對法律執行負責的憲法義務。 將上世紀內閣制的副署制度武器化,用來對抗國會多數, 正是對憲法增修條文修正後,憲政精神的嚴重扭曲! 另行政院試圖以「法律違憲」為由拒絕執行財劃法, 在法理上完全錯誤。如上所述, 憲法早已設計明確的救濟與制衡機制——覆議與釋憲。 依憲法增修條文第三條,行政院若對立法院決議不服,得提出覆議; 但一旦覆議遭否決,行政院長即「應即接受該決議」。 憲法文字剛性明確,從未賦予行政院長在覆議失敗後,仍可透過「 不副署」或「不執行」來抵制法律的執行! (相關報導: 風評:這樣的賴皮政府,非換掉不可 | 更多文章 ) 若允許行政權在覆議失敗後仍拒絕執法,覆議制度將形同具文, 國會多數決將淪為政治裝飾。這並不是卓榮泰自稱的憲政守門, 而是憲政的破門毀室惡舉! 1970年代,美國總統尼克森以控制通膨、維護財政為由, 動用所謂「扣押權(impoundment), 凍結國會已通過的撥款,拒絕執行法律。他的邏輯, 與今日賴卓政府的說辭如出一轍: 行政首長若認為國會決議錯誤或有害國家,便有「責任」阻止。 但此看法,被美國聯邦最高法院以壓倒性全票數否決, 判決尼克森敗訴,並明白宣告,...
creator: 林騰鷂

title: Why Rafale Is IAF’s Top Choice; How 114 Jets Will Boost Readiness, Strengthen India’s Defence, Cement Strategic Edge
content: New Delhi: The Indian Air Force (IAF) is set to enhance its combat readiness with the Rafale fighter jets. Their operational maturity, quick deployment capability, G2G deal advantages and Make-in-India industrial cooperation make them the ideal choice to bolster India’s aerial defence. The Indian Air Force continues to evaluate its multi-role fighter aircraft (MRFA) needs, and one name consistently rises to the top is Rafale. Among various contenders, the fighter jet stands out not only for its advanced technology but also for operational readiness, reliability and industrial continuity. This combination of attributes has made the aircraft India’s preferred choice for acquiring 114 new fighter jets. Rafale is already operational within the Indian Air Force (IAF), with established weapons integration, maintenance infrastructure and pilot training systems. The Make-in-India initiative further strengthens its industrial footprint, enhancing local assembly, maintenance and technical expertise. Add Zee News as a Preferred Source Why Rafale Is the Low-Risk Choice Air Marshal (Retd.) Anil Chopra highlights the continuity Rafale offers. Being an already operational platform, introducing it incurs no additional operational or logistical burden. In times when squadron strength is under pressure, Rafale offers a low-risk and high-readiness solution, allowing the IAF to maintain operational efficiency while rapidly boosting its capabilities, he said. G2G Deal Reduces Time, Uncertainty...

title: 4 formas en que las billeteras digitales están revolucionando los pagos en Perú
content: ERP. Camina hoy por las calles más concurridas de Lima, además de otras ciudades importantes del país y notarás algo distinto: el efectivo ya no manda como antes. Las alternativas son diversas y simples de utilizar y se evidencia un complemento entre demandantes y oferentes; sin duda una gran manera de facilitar las transacciones y la vida misma. Perú está viviendo un cambio profundo en la forma en que las personas manejan su dinero, y es realmente notable. Las billeteras digitales no solo están cambiando los pagos; están transformando por completo la manera en que un país entero se relaciona con el dinero. He seguido de cerca esta transformación y, sinceramente, es mucho más grande de lo que la mayoría imagina. Se trata de un cambio real que impacta a millones de peruanos todos los días. Aquí te explico las cuatro formas más importantes en que esto está ocurriendo. Hay un dato contundente que explica por qué este cambio es tan relevante: un gran porcentaje de los peruanos no tiene cuenta bancaria. Las billeteras digitales están cambiando ese panorama. Personas que durante años estuvieron fuera del sistema bancario tradicional ahora pueden guardar dinero, enviar pagos y recibir fondos directamente desde su celular. Sin visitas al banco. Sin trámites interminables. Aplicaciones como Yape y Plin han crecido de forma explosiva porque son realmente fáciles de usar. Una amiga en Arequipa pasó de no tener nunca una cuenta bancaria a gestionar todos los pagos...

title: SDS Australia to Launch Canadian Cedar Ice Baths in January 2026 Following Sustained Demand
content: SYDNEY , Dec. 17, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- SDS Australia has confirmed it will release its new Canadian Cedar Ice Baths in January 2026 , following months of development prompted by sustained customer demand and the growing popularity of cold-water immersion as part of at-home wellness routines. The leading wellness company says enquiries for a more accessible ice bath – one that balances premium materials with everyday usability – have become increasingly common across its showrooms and digital channels. Many customers, SDS Australia noted, were looking for a product that delivered genuine recovery performance without the scale or cost typically associated with commercial or ultra-luxury cold-plunge systems. After an extended period of design and testing, SDS Australia is now preparing to bring the range to market. The new 'Eira' Canadian Cedar Ice Baths feature solid Canadian Red Cedar cladding and are built around a hand-welded 316 marine-grade stainless steel tub, a construction method more often seen in higher-end recovery installations. On release, the range will be offered in two finishes : a Natural Cedar edition, designed to highlight the character of the timber, and a Black Cedar edition, intended for more contemporary architectural settings. Both models are suitable for indoor and outdoor use. According to SDS Australia CEO Michael Doubinski , the range was shaped directly by customer feedback. title: 비트코인 1.98% 상승한 8만7631달러, 암호화폐 일제 상승 ... "저가 매수 유입"
content: 전일 급락에 따른 반발 매수가 유입되면서 비트코인 등 암호화폐(가상화폐)가 일제히 상승하고 있다. 17일 오전 5시 50분 현재 글로벌 코인 시황 중계사이트 코인마켓캡에서 비트코인은 24시간 전보다 1.98% 상승한 8만7631달러를 기록하고 있다. 비트코인은 약 두 시간 전 8만8170달러까지 올라 8만8000달러를 회복했었다. 시총 2위 이더리움은 0.61% 상승한 2947달러에 거래되고 있다. 시총 4위 바이낸스 코인은 2.39% 상승한 870달러를, 시총 5위 리플은 1.65% 상승한 1.92달러를 각각 기록하고 있다. 이는 전일 급락에 따른 저가 매수가 유입되고 있기 때문으로 보인다. 전일 비트코인은 8만5381달러까지, 리플은 1.86달러까지 추락하는 등 암호화폐는 일제히 급락했었다. 이코노미퀸 김정현 기자

title: La depresión: más allá de la tristeza pasajera
content: La depresión clínica, o trastorno depresivo mayor, es una enfermedad médica grave y común que afecta negativamente cómo se siente, piensa y actúa una persona. Es fundamental distinguirla de la tristeza normal o el desánimo temporal que todos experimentamos tras una pérdida o un evento decepcionante. A diferencia de la tristeza, que es una emoción pasajera y una respuesta natural a las circunstancias de la vida, la depresión es un estado de ánimo persistentemente bajo o una pérdida de interés o placer en actividades que antes se disfrutaban, que se mantiene durante al menos dos semanas y que interfiere significativamente con la vida diaria. Aunque sus causas no son únicas, se cree que es el resultado de una compleja interacción de factores: Cambios en la química cerebral, especialmente en la función de neurotransmisores como la serotonina y la dopamina. Tener antecedentes familiares de depresión aumenta el riesgo. El estrés crónico, el trauma, el abuso o las pérdidas significativas. Patrones de pensamiento negativos o baja autoestima. Para ser diagnosticada, la depresión debe incluir una combinación de varios síntomas, la mayoría de los cuales deben estar presentes casi todos los días: Sentirse triste, vacío o desesperanzado la mayor parte del día. Pérdida marcada de interés o placer en todas o casi todas las actividades. Aumento o pérdida significativa de peso sin hacer dieta, o cambios en el apetito. content: [충청투데이 함성곤 기자] 대전에 거주하는 원자폭탄 피해 1세대 이영자(81) 옹은 오랜 시간 마음속에 묻어두었던 이야기를 꺼내며 이렇게 말했다. 1940년 초, 경남 합천이 고향인 그의 부모는 일자리를 찾아 가족을 이끌고 일본 히로시마로 건너갔고, 이 옹은 1944년 10월 히로시마에서 태어나 삶을 시작했다. 히로시마와 나가사키에 원자폭탄이 투하된 것은 이듬해 8월. 두 살 남짓한 아기였던 그는 당시의 장면을 직접 기억하지는 못한다. 하지만 피폭 이후 가족들이 겪어야 했던 고통은 평생 지워지지 않는 기억으로 남아 있다. 이 옹은 "원폭이 터졌을 때 오빠들은 주변 연못으로 뛰어들었고, 나는 어머니 등에 업혀 있었다"며 "팔과 다리가 밖으로 드러난 채였다고 가족들에게서 들었다"고 말했다. 이후 피폭의 상처는 가족 전체를 덮쳤다. 오빠 셋과 삼촌, 부모 모두 피폭 피해를 당했다. 팔과 다리는 마치 불에 그을린 사람처럼 변했고, 배와 등 피부는 쪼그라들고 우그러졌다. 하지만 상처는 몸에만 남지 않았다. 사람들의 시선이 두려워 목욕탕조차 갈 수 없었다. "저 사람들 가까이 가면 방사능 옮는 것 아니냐"는 말도 들었다. 그렇게 오빠 셋과 삼촌, 아버지는 모두 30~40대의 이른 나이에 세상을 떠났다. 한국으로 돌아온 뒤에도 이 옹의 몸은 편할 날이 없었다. 이유 없는 잦은 병치레가 이어졌고, 어느 순간부터 온몸에 하얀 반점이 퍼지기 시작했다. 30대에는 자궁암 수술을 받았고, 5년 전에는 유방암 진단을 받고 다시 수술대에 올랐다. 뼈는...

title: 美, 시리아·남수단 등 7개국 국민 전면 입국 금지...내년 1월1일 발효
content: ◆...도널드 트럼프 미국 대통령 도널드 트럼프 미국 대통령이 16일(현지시간) 시리아를 포함한 7개국 국민의 미국 입국을 전면 금지하는 조치를 단행했다. 로이터 통신에 따르면 백악관은 이날 성명을 내고 "트럼프 대통령이 국가 안보 및 공공 안전 위협으로부터 국가를 보호하기 위한 심사·검증·정보 공유에 있어 지속적이고 심각한 결함이 확인된 국가 출신자에 대한 입국 제한을 확대 및 강화하는 포고령에 서명했다"고 밝혔다. 해당 조치는 내년 1월 1일부터 발효된다. 이번 포고령에 따라 부르키나파소, 말리, 니제르, 남수단, 시리아 국민과 팔레스타인 자치정부(PA)가 발급한 증명서 소지자의 미국 입국이 전면 금지된다. 또한 기존에 부분적으로만 제한됐던 라오스와 시에라리온도 전면 입국 금지국으로 재분류됐다. 트럼프 대통령은 지난 6월 12개국 국민의 미국 입국을 전면 금지하고 7개국에 대해서는 제한하는 포고령에 서명한 바 있다. 백악관은 당시 지정된 12개국에 대한 조치도 여전히 유지된다고 밝혔다. 이와 함께 트럼프 대통령은 나이지리아를 포함한 추가 15개국에 대해 부분 입국 제한 조치를 새로 적용했다. 포고령에는 미국 영주권자와 이미 유효한 비자를 소지한 사람, 선수·외교관 등 특정 비자 소지자, 미국의 국가 이익에 부합한다고 판단되는 경우 등에 대한 예외 조항도 포함됐다. 이번 결정은 트럼프 대통령이 지난해 11월 아흐메드 알샤라 시리아 대통령과의 역사적 회담 이후 "시리아의 성공을 위해 모든 노력을...

title: 박나래 초대에 웃음으로 답한 조인성... 8년 전 ‘나래바’ 발언 화제 [왓IS]
content: 사진출처=MBC에브리원 예능 ‘비디오스타’ 배우 조인성이 과거 방송인 박나래의 ‘나래바’ 초대를 재치 있게 거절한 발언이 다시금 화제를 모으고 있다. 최근 온라인 커뮤니티에는 2017년 8월 방송된 MBC에브리원 예능 ‘비디오스타’의 한 장면이 재조명됐다. 당시 방송에서는 박경림이 절친한 사이인 조인성에게 전화를 걸어 박나래와 통화를 연결하는 모습이 담겼다. 이날 박나래는 “미녀 개그우먼 박나래”라고 자신을 소개한 뒤 “시간 되시면 나래바에 한번 놀러 오라”며 조인성을 초대했다. 이에 조인성은 “거기는 들어가는 건 자유지만, 나올 때는 자유가 아니지 않냐”고 너스레를 떤 뒤 “초대해주신다면 부모님과 함께 가겠다”고 말해 웃음을 자아냈다. 한편 박나래는 전 매니저들을 상대로 갑질을 했다는 논란과 함께, 이른바 ‘주사이모’로 불리는 인물로부터 불법 의료 행위를 받았다는 의혹에 휩싸인 바 있다. 논란이 이어지자 박나래는 방송 활동 중단을 선언했다. 이후 MBC ‘나 혼자 산다’, ‘구해줘! 홈즈’, tvN ‘놀라운 토요일’ 등 출연 중이던 예능 프로그램에서 잇따라 하차하며 사실상 활동을 중단한 상태다.

title: 모두가 부러워하는 '대주자의 인생 역전'...신민재의 행복한 12월
content: 신민재가 26일 서울 잠실야구장에서 열린 한화와의 한국시리즈 1차전 6회 말 1사 만루 때 2타점 적시타를 친 후 기뻐하고 있다. LG 트윈스 내야수 신민재(29)가 누구보다 행복한 12월을 보내고 있다. 신민재는 독일 분데스리가 축구 명문 FC 바이에른 뮌헨 구단의 소셜미디어(SNS)에 등장했다. 뮌헨 구단이 지난 15일 '민재가 민재에게'라는 제목의 영상을 게재한 것이다. '두 민재'는 축구대표팀 김민재와 한국 야구대표팀 신민재를 의미한다. 신민재. 사진=뮌헨 SNS 최근 뮌헨 관계자가 서울 잠실구장을 찾아 신민재에게 선물을 전달했다. 상자 안에는 김민재의 등번호인 3과 영문명 'MINJAE'가 적힌 뮌헨 유니폼이 있었다. 이에 신민재는 LG 유니폼에 '김민재'와 '3'을 새겨넣어 답례했다. 신민재는 "같은 민재로서 앞으로도 선전을 기원하겠습니다. 민재 파이팅!"이라고 외쳤다. 유니폼 교환 이벤트는 뮌헨 구단이 먼저 제안했다. 해당 영상은 신민재가 KBO 골든글러브 수상(2루수 부문)한 이틀 뒤인 지난 11일 촬영됐다. 동갑내기 '두 민재'는 이전까지 개인적인 전혀 인연이 없었다. 뮌헨 구단이 지난 10일 SNS를 통해 신민재의 생애 첫 골든글러브 수상을 축하하며 '축구는 김민재, 야구는 신민재'라고 써서 주목을 받았다. 게시물 하단에는 'from 김민재 구단 바이에른 뮌헨'이라고 썼다. 신민재는 "(해외 인기 축구 팀에서) 내게 관심을 가져주셔서 감사하다"고 말했다. 2019년 타격 훈련 중인 신민재. IS 포토 '대주자 출신' 신민재는...

title: "Манчестер Сити" — "Брентфорд". Прогноз и варианты ставок на матч Кубка английской лиги 17 декабря
content: Обе команды в последний раз проходили эту стадию Кубка Лиги в 2021 году. "Горожане" впоследствии завоевали этот трофей, причем в четвертый раз подряд. А после этого команда Хосепа Гвардиолы как будто совсем потеряла интерес к данному турниру. С тех пор "МанСити" никогда не проходил дальше четвертьфинала, да и до этой стадии не всегда добирался. Что касается "Брентфорда", он и вовсе преодолевал этот раунд один раз за всю историю в том самом 2021 году, когда победил "Ньюкасл", а затем уступил "Тоттенхэму". В текущем розыгрыше "Манчестер Сити" впервые сыграет с командой премьер-лиги. До этого он прошел "Хаддерсфилд" (Д3) и "Суонси" (Д2). А вот "Брентфорд", который вступил в дело чуть раньше, успел выбить "Борнмут", "Астон Виллу", а затем расправился с "Гримсби" (Д4), который до этого сенсационно обыграл "Манчестер Юнайтед". В целом Кубок Лиги — это турнир, который ценится больше у таких клубов, как "Брентфорд", неизбалованных трофеями. Но все-таки и "Манчестер Сити" даже на предыдущих стадиях не играл совсем уж резервным составом, хотя и не использовали некоторых основных футболистов (того же Холагнда). К тому же "пчелы" на нынешнем отрезке сезона не впечатляют (набрали одно очко в последних трех матчах премьер-лиги). Так что склоняемся все же к победе хозяев, хотя она вряд ли будет с большим перевесом. Наш выбор — либо просто (кф. — до 1.52), либо (кф. — до 2.60). .

title: Chemical Bonds Created On Our Carbon Capture Journey
content: In Australia, carbon capture and storage has significant potential for climate change mitigation because of its large geological storage resources. According to the International Energy Agency’s 2023 Net Zero Roadmap, reaching net zero emissions by 2050 requires capturing 6+ billion tonnes of global CO2 annually by mid-century. This includes CO2 from fossil fuels, industrial processes, bioenergy, and ambient air. CSIRO works across the CCS spectrum, often at the leading edge of the research and its commercialisation. A recent independent study, The Carbon Capture and Storage Impact Assessment Report (CCSIAR), outlines our instrumental role in progressing CCS research and development during the past 25 years. When CSIRO began major Australian CCS research in the late 1990s, the technologies lacked frameworks, monitoring systems and commercial validation. Today, our collaborations have expanded the frontiers of CCS – bridging laboratory research and field deployment, building confidence in technical feasibility, safety and scalability. The dominance of the capture component in the overall cost of CCS has seen CSIRO pioneer absorbent-based carbon capture technologies. At its heart is a family of specially formulated chemical absorbent solutions – using cyclic amines – that have been tested, refined and proven through a series of multi-stakeholder pilot plant trials across the country and the globe. CSIRO’s early research cast a wide net, exploring everything from ionic liquids...

title: NEW REPORT PROVIDES TARGET FOR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AS EFFECTIVE SOLUTION TO THE CHRONIC HOMELESSNESS CRISIS IN WA
content: In an Australian first, a new report has estimated the scale of housing and support needed to address chronic homelessness in Perth and Bunbury. Supportive Housing Needs Assessment WA was commissioned by the WA Alliance to End Homelessness (WAAEH) to calculate the unmet need for Supportive Housing in Perth and Bunbury. Supportive Housing, such as the Common Ground model, combines the provision of stable housing with wrap-around supports for people experiencing chronic homelessness and complex challenges. The report sets out the number of homes required, the investment needed to deliver and sustain them, and the social and economic benefits of doing so. Findings: The report recommends the WA government develop and fund wrap-around support for at least 640 new Supportive Housing units across metropolitan Perth and Bunbury, and funding to increase wrap around services and tenancy management to another 640 existing social homes across Perth and Bunbury, over the next five years. Funding sources could include contributions from the federal government’s Housing Australia Future Fund and the WA Government’s Community Housing New Builds Grants. Quotes attributable to WAAEH Executive Director Louise Olney: “The Western Australian Alliance to End Homelessness (WAAEH) commissioned this research because we believe that ending homelessness in our state is not only achievable but is our responsibility. “For years, the community sector has known that Supportive Housing works. But we’ve...

title: Project ‘Airbear’ tech could help predict best koala habitats from the sky
content: Powerful technology that efficiently detects and accurately predicts eucalyptus tree species favoured by koalas could help ecologists find the best habitats for conservation. Researchers, in a study coined ‘Project Airbear’, used hyperspectral airborne imagery technology taking high resolution images of the environment. Spectral images record how light reflects from objects at different wavelengths, including invisible light beyond what the human eye can see. Hyperspectral images go further by capturing this information in many very narrow wavelength bands for every pixel in the image, allowing subtle differences in materials or vegetation to be detected. From a great distance, the project’s aerial technology records visible and infra-red lightwaves reflecting off surfaces making it possible to detect the spectral signatures produced by leaf pigments, water content and chemical composition, including nitrogen content vital for koala nutrition. Using these hyperspectral airborne images, the researchers trained complex machine learning models to leverage information in individual tree canopy pixels and identify tree species containing the nitrogen preferred by koalas. By combining tree species identification with nutritional data, the method can highlight areas where koalas are most likely to thrive. HyVista taking hyperspectral airborne imagery of remanent vegetation (potential koala habitat) in agricultural land. Credit: Glen Huber Koala populations are declining...

title: TreeClimb branches out nationally with new Hobart venue under construction
content: Australia’s fastest-growing adventure tourism operator is heading south, with TreeClimb now constructing a brand-new venue in Hobart, marking a major milestone in the company’s rapid national expansion. Until now, TreeClimb has operated exclusively in Adelaide, Salisbury and Kuitpo Forest, establishing a reputation as South Australia’s leading aerial adventure experience. Set to launch in February 2026, the highly anticipated Hobart venue will be TreeClimb’s first interstate site, with two more to follow in Queensland’s Logan Gardens and Hervey Bay. This new wave of expansion follows a year of significant growth for the operator, after TreeClimb Founder and Managing Director Seb Packer’s recent acquisition of the iconic Otway Fly and Illawarra Fly Treetop Adventure parks in Victoria and New South Wales, respectively. Together with the new Hobart site and upcoming Queensland locations, TreeClimb is emerging as a major national player in Australia’s nature-based tourism landscape. “We’re incredibly excited to be bringing TreeClimb to Tasmania,” said Mr Packer. “From our beginnings as Australia’s first inner-city aerial adventure park in Adelaide, to now building a presence across multiple states, we can’t wait to expand TreeClimb into a truly national brand.” Construction is now underway on the Hobart adventure park, which will feature TreeClimb’s signature aerial high-ropes challenges – including numerous ziplines over 100 metres long – along with a range of new experiences...

title: UNSW students claim victory in international artificial heart competition
content: A team of undergraduate engineering students from UNSW Sydney has claimed first place at a prestigious international artificial heart design competition in Vienna. The Mending Broken Hearts (MBH) team won the 2025 International Heart Hackathon Finals earlier this month, beating 13 teams from more than 10 countries. The competition is the world’s first and only international Total Artificial Heart (TAH) design challenge for undergraduate students, bringing together some of the best emerging engineering talent from around the globe. The Heart Hackathon challenges teams to design, prototype and present next-generation artificial heart technologies – devices that could one day save the lives of people with severe heart failure. Cardiovascular disease remains a leading cause of death in Australia, affecting around one in nine Australians. UNSW’s winning team was made up of 27 undergraduate students from mechanical, electrical, software and control engineering disciplines. Over several months, the students collaborated to develop a novel total artificial heart concept based on a rotary undulation pump, re-imagining a design first explored two decades ago and applying modern engineering approaches to create a new solution. Dr Audrey Adji, the academic lead of the team (research scientist at the Victor Chang Cardiac Research Institute/St Vincent’s Hospital Applied Medical Research Centre and a conjoint senior lecturer at UNSW) said: “This achievement is the culmination of our team’s...

title: Proteomics International Laboratories Ltd (ASX:PIQ) US Patent Secured for PromarkerEso Diagnostic Test for Throat Cancer
content: US patent secured for PromarkerEso diagnostic test for esophageal adenocarcinoma Perth, Dec 17, 2025 AEST (ABN Newswire) - Proteomics International Laboratories Ltd ( ASX:PIQ ) ( PIQLF:OTCMKTS ), a pioneer in precision diagnostics, announced it has secured new intellectual property protection with the US Patent Office granting a patent for PromarkerEso, the proprietary first-in-class blood test for esophageal adenocarcinoma (EAC). - Patent granted in USA protecting the intellectual property for PromarkerEso proprietary blood test for the early diagnosis of esophageal adenocarcinoma (EAC) - Major milestone as the patent underpins the commercialisation pathway in the world's largest healthcare market, enabling direct sales, future partnerships and licensing opportunities - Patents for the PromarkerEso diagnostic test now cover multiple jurisdictions including Australia, China, Hong Kong, Europe and the USA - Global health impact: currently 90% of EAC cases go undetected until late stage, leading to a median survival time of less than one year - EAC is commonly caused by chronic acid reflux or GERD, which is present in 20% of people in the USA Esophageal cancer represents a critical global health challenge, ranking seventh in cancer-related mortality and eleventh in overall prevalence. title: What to know about last-minute holiday shipping deadlines, avoiding fees
content: The week before Christmas is traditionally the busiest week of the year for the USPS, which means procrastinators should expect to wait in line. Tuesday, December 16, 2025 6:56PMThe week before Christmas is traditionally the busiest week of the year for the carrier, which means procrastinators should expect to wait in line. The agency's holiday mail tracker shows more than seven billion pieces of mail are already on the move nationwide. To ensure packages make it in time for Christmas, the ground and first-class mail deadline is Wednesday, December 17. The priority mail deadline is Thursday, December 18, with the priority mail express deadline Saturday, December 20.Here are some additional options:UPS also offers 2nd Day Air, which must ship by Dec. 22, and UPS Next Day Air, which has a Dec. 23 deadline.Tips to save on holiday shippingPut a card inside the package with your return address just in case it gets damaged.Ship packages directly to friend or family member when possible. Consider USPS Flat Rate boxes, which offers a range of envelope and box sizes, and won't charge customers more than the specified amount.Anyone shopping gifts online right now may notice added fees related to tariffs, which can occur either at checkout -- separate from shipping and taxes -- or after your package is delivered. title: FIFA responds to fan outrage, establishes new World Cup ticket tier with $60 prices
content: FIFA announced a series of new ticket initiatives intended to make access the 2026 World Cup more affordable for supports of various participating teams. FIFA announced an affordable admission pricing tier for every nation that’s qualified for the 2026 World Cup co-hosted by the U.S., Canada and Mexico. The supporter entry tier will make tickets available at a fixed price of $60 for every match, including the final, for each nation’s participating members associations. The new tier comes after supporters’ groups from Europe called out FIFA on the dynamic pricing of tickets, which changes the value based on the popularity of the teams playing in each match. “In total, 50% of each PMA allocation will fall within the most affordable range, namely supporter value tier and the supporter entry tier ,” FIFA said in a statement on Tuesday. “The remaining allocation is split evenly between the supporter standard tier and the supporter premier tier.” FIFA will also waive the administrative fees for fans who secure participating member association tickets, but their teams do not advance and they seek refunds. Tickets sales were rolled out by FIFA in phases, with a third of the tournament’s inventory claimed during the first two phases. The third phase started on Dec. 11 and will go through to Jan. 13. During this period, fans have the opportunity to allocate tickets for a match based on a random selection draw. Before the new tier was introduced, the cheapest ticket for the World Cup...

Dean Schott, who served as Lyons' boy's varsity basketball coach, was sentenced by Judge Richard Healy to 10 years of probation, prosecutors said. The district said it received a report April 8 claiming Schott was involved in an inappropriate relationship with a student in 2019. Schott was escorted off campus during a school day after the allegations surfaced, according to Sheriff Robert Milby of the Wayne County Sheriff's Office.Schott resigned immediately, according to the district, which did not find any evidence that he was involved in inappropriate relations with any current students. The victim’s courage in coming forward exposed a serious abuse of trust," District Attorney Christine Callanan said in a statement. title: Hudson Williams Breaks Down His Multi-Step Skincare Routine

Here, Hudson Williams shares his. : Our favorite beauty pros share the products they love — the ones so good they’ll make you hit that little “auto-refill” box at checkout., who have as much chemistry off-screen as they do on. While I watched, I couldn’t take my gaze off of Williams’s skin. Sure, he’s only 24, but his complexion is smooth and poreless in a way that can only be achieved through phenomenal genetics or lots of focused effort. Turns out, it’s probably a mix of both — his Korean mother and her three sisters drilled skin-care habits into him from a very young age. “My interest in beauty was always bound to be there, being half Korean,” he told me over Zoom from Los Angeles. “My one auntie is the plug. She gets skin-care products for me every birthday and every Christmas.” Williams says that Storrie, on the other hand, doesn’t even like to wear sunscreen, which horrified the Canadian actor. “I was like,,” he says. title: New ‘CRASH Clock’ Warns of 2.8-Day Window Before Likely Orbital Collision
content: The CRASH Clock is a new metric for measuring the risks of satellite congestion in low-Earth orbit. Its calculations are disturbing. The CRASH Clock is a new metric for measuring the risks of satellite congestion in low-Earth orbit. Its calculations are disturbing. According to a new study, such near misses are now happening all the time in low-Earth orbit, and the risk of disaster is shockingly high. The CRASH Clock is a new metric for measuring the risks of satellite congestion in low-Earth orbit. Its calculations are disturbing.. According to a new study, such near misses are now happening all the time in low-Earth orbit, and the risk of disaster is shockingly high., which have yet to be peer-reviewed, paint a disturbing picture. Based on the number of objects in LEO last June, a sudden loss of collision-avoidance capabilities would likely lead to a catastrophic crash within just 2.8 days. Such a collision could set off a major debris-generating event that would cause more collisions and potentially initiate the first stage of. In this theoretical scenario, LEO becomes so congested with orbiters and debris that collisions between objects trigger a chain reaction, creating exponentially more debris. This would weaken the satellite networks we depend on and render some orbits useless for new satellites and missions. title: Inside Sudan’s starvation siege: First US network to reach El Fasher survivors
content: Scripps News became the first American news network to reach a remote displacement camp in the Sudanese desert and speak directly with survivors who escaped El Fasher. Sudan is now the world's worst humanitarian crisis, according to a new report from the International Rescue Committee, as war, starvation and mass displacement continue to devastate the country and cut off large parts of Darfur from outside scrutiny. The IRC's latest Emergency Watchlist ranks Sudan at the top of its global list, citing what aid groups describe as the largest displacement and hunger emergency in the world. More than 14 million people have been forced from their homes, about half of them children, according to United Nations agencies and humanitarian organizations.The report comes amid mounting allegations of atrocities committed by the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces in the Darfur city of El Fasher, which fell after a prolonged siege that blocked food, medicine and humanitarian access. No independent journalists have been allowed into the city, leaving much of what happened there difficult to verify.Aid groups say El Fasher endured an 18-month siege that lasted roughly 500 days before the RSF overran the city on October 26. Hundreds of thousands of civilians were trapped inside. Human rights organizations and UN officials have reported killings, abductions and systematic violence against non-Arab ethnic and tribal communities in Darfur.The Rapid Support Forces are descendants of the Janjaweed...

After another lost season, the team’s 15th straight year missing the playoffs and the longest streak in American pro sports, he’s had enough.“Ok, gang. Just got my bill for next year — $2,600 for one seat. The Captain can take no more,” Hoffman wroteSince their last postseason appearance in the 2010 AFC Championship game, the team has been trapped in a never-ending cycle of bad decisions. They’ve churned through multiple head coaches , general managers , and highly drafted quarterbacks , including Geno Smith, Sam Darnold and Zach Wilson, with none able to deliver even a single playoff berth. The franchise’s inability to find a quarterback has been the main reason for its failures. They’ve wasted talented defenses and promising young players, like Garrett Wilson and Sauce Gardner. title: Newark Man Arrested, Charged with Murder in Zurich Bog Trail Body Discovery
content: Jared Nesmith, 35, was arrested and charged with murder, concealment of a human corpse, and tampering with physical evidence after leading investigators to the body of Conan Guard on the Zurich Bog Trail. The investigation began with a report of a suspicious conversation. Nesmith allegedly stabbed Guard at a home in Newark. The Ontario County District Attorney's Office is also undergoing a leadership change. The investigation into his death began Sept. 30 when someone reported overhearing a conversation indicating someone was killed and disposed of in the Sodus area, according to the Newark Police Department. Jared Nesmith, 35, was identified as a suspect and was taken into custody later that day following a brief foot pursuit in Newark, police said. During an interview the following day, investigators determined Nesmith dumped Guard's remains at the trail. Police said Nesmith was arrested and charged with murder, concealment of a human corpse and tampering with physical evidence. He was indicted by a grand jury and arraigned Monday, according to prosecutors. title: The Warner Bros Curse
content: The most important stories for you to know today This isn't the first time Warner Bros. has been at the center of headline-grabbing merger or acquisition. Actually, Warner Bros. has a long history of messy corporate marriages and divorces. It could be a cautionary tale about the dangers of mergers and acquisitions. You could even call it the Warner Bros. Curse.Over the last decade alone, the Warner Bros. Curse has shown itself at least twice. In 2018, after a two-year regulatory battle, AT&T acquired what was then called Time Warner forAT&T overpaid for the company, and the stock market never seemed to really love this deal. WarnerMedia struggled to find big profits in streaming, its movie business was devastated by the pandemic, and the companies' cultures You could even call it the Warner Bros. Curse. title: FIFA slashes price of some World Cup tickets to $60 after global fan backlash
content: FIFA said Tuesday that $60 tickets will be made available for every game at the tournament in North America, going to the national federations whose teams are playing. FIFA slashed the price of some World Cup tickets for teams' most loyal fans following a global backlash and some will get $60 seats for the final instead of being asked to pay $4,185. FIFA said Tuesday that $60 tickets will be made available for every game at the tournament in North America, going to the national federations whose teams are playing. Those federations decide how to distribute them to loyal fans who have attended previous games at home and on the road. The number of $60 tickets for each game is likely to be in the hundreds, rather than thousands, in what FIFA is now calling a “Supporter Entry Tier” price category. FIFA did not specify exactly why it so dramatically changed strategy, but said the lower prices are “designed to further support travelling fans following their national teams across the tournament.” The World Cup in North America will be the first edition that features 48 teams — up from 32 — and is expected to earn FIFA at least $10 billion in revenue. But fans worldwide reacted with shock and anger last week on seeing FIFA’s ticketing plans that gave participating teams no tickets in the lowest-priced category.The cheapest prices ranged from $120 to $265 for group-stage games that did not involve co-hosts the United States, Canada and Mexico. FIFA had set those prices despite the...

title: SpaceX eyes possible record IPO. What's behind the hype
content: Elon Musk's SpaceX is eyeing an initial public offering that could be the largest ever, at least partially driven by a plan to launch AI data centers into orbit. SpaceX has transformed the aerospace industry with its reusable rockets — radically lowering the cost of lifting satellites into space while bringing internet service to all corners of the globe with its Starlink network. Now, Elon Musk's privately held company is eyeing what could be the largest initial public offering ever as it faces multiple challenges — including landing Americans on the moon, satisfying the billionaire's ambitious if quixotic desires to colonize Mars and potentially putting AI data centers into orbit. The company is seeking to raise more than $30 billion with an IPO perhaps late next year that would value the company at $1.5 trillion, according to reports. The funding could speed development of its deep-space Starship spacecraft, key to its moon and Mars missions, as it explores the orbiting data center concept — all of which has drawn skepticism, given their need for cutting-edge technological advances. Here's what to know about Musk's plans for the company, which moved to Texas last year but retains large operations at its Hawthorne complex. SpaceX did not return emails seeking comment. SpaceX has been private since it was founded in 2002. Why is it going public now? Plain and simple, the company has a voracious appetite for capital. Musk has said on his social media network X that the...

Donald Trump’s chief of staff has confirmed the president is in the Jeffrey Epstein files and travelled on the sex offender’s plane when they were young “playboys.” Despite Trump insisting for months that the Epstein firestorm is a Democratic hoax, Susie Wiles, one of his most trusted aides, has revealed that she has read the material and that the president is in them—but “he’s not in the file doing anything awful. ”“They were, you know, sort of young, single, whatever—I know it’s a passé word but sort of young, single playboys together,” she told Vanity Fair. Wiles’s comments were part of a bombshell interview published on Tuesday that provided a rare, often unflattering insight into the Trump administration. In the article, which Wiles has since sought to walk back, she also claimed Trump had not been consulted about Epstein’s convicted associate Ghislaine Maxwell being moved to a cushy jail after her unusual interview with deputy attorney general Todd Blanche earlier this year.“The president was ticked,” according to Wiles. “The president was mighty unhappy. I don’t know why they moved her. Neither does the president.” The 68-year-old also revealed that it was Blanche, Trump’s former personal attorney, who suggested traveling to Florida to interview Maxwell, a move many branded at the time as an attempt to negate the political firestorm Trump faced. title: Ex-doctor linked to Matthew Perry's death sentenced to home confinement
content: Chavez, 55, of San Diego, pleaded guilty in October 2024 to one federal count of conspiracy to distribute ketamine. LOS ANGELES - Mark Chavez, the second of two doctors convicted in 'Friends' star Matthew Perry 's death from a ketamine overdose, was sentenced Tuesday in downtown Los Angeles to eight months of home confinement and ordered to perform 300 hours of community service for illegally supplying the anesthetic drug. Chavez, 55, of San Diego, pleaded guilty in October 2024 to one federal count of conspiracy to distribute ketamine. He subsequently surrendered his medical license. Chavez operated a San Diego-area ketamine infusion clinic at the time of Perry's death in 2023.Chavez admitted that he and a second then-doctor, Salvador Plasencia, began supplying ketamine to Perry beginning around September 2023. The general anesthetic is used as a therapy for depression, but is also abused as a so- called party drug that can cause visual and auditory distortions.Plasencia, 44, of Santa Monica, was sentenced to 2 1/2 years in federal prison on Dec. 3 after pleading guilty last summer to four counts of distributing ketamine. He too gave up his medical license.All five defendants charged in Perry's death have pleaded guilty. Lead defendant Jasveen Sangha -- a North Hollywood dealer dubbed the 'Ketamine Queen' -- will be sentenced Feb. 25.According to federal prosecutors, in late September 2023, Plasencia learned that Perry, whose history of depression and drug addiction was...

title: Chicago finance committee approves alternate budget proposal without mayor's controversial head tax
content: A Chicago City Council committee approved an alternative budget plan brought by a group of alderpersons on Tuesday. Johnson, for the first time, met with 11 leaders of a group of city council members who are pushing the alternative budget at City Hall. It is something the group has been asking for over the past couple of weeks as they try to negotiate a budget deal. Both sides held press conferences after that meeting, which, it appears, did not do much to solve the problem. While the group of alderpersons have offered some compromises in their plan, there are still several sticking points between the two groups. Earlier Monday morning, a city council meeting on the floor was over before it began. Thirty alderpersons did not show up, so there was no quorum. "People have been working all through the weekend, but I think just the decency and respect we call the meeting to show up for the meeting, and I'm disappointed that our colleagues have not decided to show up today to do the business of the people," said Budget Committee Chairman Ald. Jason Ervin. The empty seats included those members who are trying to advance their own budget without the mayor's controversial corporate head tax, which takes aim at 175 of the largest companies in Chicago and remains one of the central sticking points. The group of alderpersons who are backing the alternative budget asked the mayor, during their meeting, if he would veto their current plan. But, they say, he would not give them an answer....

title: Rob Reiner was more than a Hollywood legend. He helped shape California politics
content: Rob Reiner may be best known for his Hollywood films, but he was also a Democratic political force in California. Rob Reiner talks on the phone at his office at Castle Rock Enterprises, seeking donations for anti-smoking campaigns on July 28, 1998, in Beverly Hills, Calif. The rest of the country may remember Hollywood legend Rob Reiner for his work in front of and behind the camera, but in California, he leaves behind a political legacy that endures beyond his films and movie and television roles. Reiner, a longtime Democratic activist, donor and fundraiser, played a critical role in the legalization of same-sex marriage in California, and he was a driving force behind California’s signature early-childhood development program,Police investigators announced Monday that their son, Nick Reiner, 32, had been arrested and was being held on suspicion of their murder. Rob and Nick Reiner once worked together on“I can’t believe it,” former California Gov. Gray Davis told CalMatters Monday in a phone interview. “I mean, Rob and Michele have been part of Sharon and I’s life for over 30 years.” Sharon Davis is the former governor’s wife. Davis said he’ll never forget when Rob Reiner in 1991 invited him — then California’s elected controller — to hang out on the set of Reiner’s “A Few Good Men.” Davis got to watch for hours as actors including Tom Cruise, Kevin Bacon, Demi Moore and Jack Nicholson did their scenes.But a few years later, the two became something akin to coworkers....

title: 'It had me in tears!' Business owner says Meta's false allegation led to her lawsuit, others in same situation
content: Investigative Reporter at News 5 Cleveland A Cleveland woman said a major company made a major mistake that forced her to lose business, and she’s not the only one. Meta , which owns Facebook and Instagram , took down her pages, and she wants others to hear what happened. 'Honestly, my heart is just for kids. I have a heart for kids,” said Halle St. John. Her alter ego is Halle Bo Bally, a fun character that took years to perfect and to build her business for children to enjoy. 'I read storybooks to children in a very whacky, fanciful, fun way,” said St. John in full Halle Bo Bally character on a promotional video.THE TERRIBLE ALLEGATIONSt. John relied on social media to help her book children’s events across Northeast Ohio, but then she said an unexpected message from Meta came in saying her account was suspended. The reason? Child sexual exploitation.'I’m telling you, the minute I read that, I was in tears,” said St. John. “I was in tears because for me this is a children’s business that I run, and there couldn’t have been a worse allegation.”St. John said she knew she did nothing wrong, immediately appealed the suspension through Meta, but got no response. She told us she even wrote a snail-mail letter, but still nothing.THE FRUSTRATION & LAWSUITShe was frustrated with no customer service number to call or a human to email. So, she filed a lawsuit in the Cleveland Municipal Court. 'False pretenses, false allegations, defamation of reputation and I said, 'If this is the...

title: Maryland will consider slavery reparations after Gov. Wes Moore's veto is overridden
content: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Maryland will create a commission to study potential reparations for slavery after lawmakers voted Tuesday to override a veto by Gov. ANNAPOLIS, Md. — Maryland will create a commission to study potential reparations for slavery after lawmakers voted Tuesday to override a veto by Gov. Wes Moore — currently the nation’s only Black governor — that disappointed many fellow Democrats. Moore said in his veto letter in May that it was a difficult decision to veto the bill, which was a priority of the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland. But he wrote there has been enough study of the legacy of slavery, and it was now time to “focus on the work itself” to address it.But Democrats who control both chambers of the Maryland General Assembly decided the commission was needed to better examine how to do that. “This topic isn’t easy, but, again, without formal study, reparations risk being dismissed as symbolic or unconstitutional, regardless of moral merit,” said Sen. Charles Sydnor, a Democrat.include official statements of apology, monetary compensation, property tax rebates, social service assistance, as well as licensing and permit fee waivers and reimbursement. Reparations also could include assistance with making a down payment on a home, business incentives, childcare, debt forgiveness and tuition payment waivers for higher education. Maryland’s Black population is about 30%, the highest percentage of any state outside of the Deep South. Support for...

title: Global EV and PHEV Sales Surge Driven by China and Europe
content: Global sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and plug-in hybrid vehicles (PHEVs) reached 18.5 million units this year, marking a 21% increase. China and Europe are the primary drivers of this growth, while North America experienced a decline. The report highlights regional variations and the impact of policy on consumer behavior. EV and PHEV sales climbed significantly in China and Europe . Roughly 18.5 million electrified vehicles were sold this year. North America's EV market declined despite global momentum. While the headlines might suggest an EV apocalypse is underway, with manufacturers pulling back and investments drying up, the reality is a bit more complicated. Sure, some markets are cooling and certain automakers are reconsidering their timelines, but the global picture paints a different story. At least for now. The coming months could easily tip the scale again, especially in regions where policy and consumer behavior tend to swing fast. Read: More Buyers Are Ditching EVs And Choosing Gas Again New data shows that worldwide sales of battery-electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles have actually grown this year, bolstered by steady demand in China and across Europe. According to figures from Rho Motion, approximately 18.5 million EVs and PHEVs have been sold globally between January and November 2025, representing a 21 percent increase from last year. Where the Growth Is Unsurprisingly, China leads the way with reported sales of 11.6 million, a 19 percent rise from the...

title: CNN Data Guru Reveals Issue That Could Swing Voters Back to Trump
content: Younger voters could be swayed by a policy decision floated by the administration. President Donald Trump could potentially win favor from younger voters with a particular policy decision, CNN data correspondent Harry Enten says. Enten, the network’s chief data analyst, said on Tuesday that the president’s potential decision to reclassify marijuana as a Schedule III substance “would be some of the best politics that Donald Trump has done in a long period of time. ”, first shared a range of data showing the uptick in voters who believe marijuana should be legal, which has risen a whopping 52 percent since 1969. “In 1969, it was just 12 percent. In ‘85, 23 percent. Twenty years ago, it was 36 percent,” Enten told anchor Kate Bolduan on. “Look at this—nearly double from where we were just 20 years ago, in terms of the percentage of Americans who say that marijuana should, in fact, be legalized in the country."“64 percent—two in three Americans," Enten added. “You rarely get two in three Americans to agree on anything. But they do, in fact, agree that marijuana should be legal.” Enten expressed that the usage of marijuana among Americans has seen a similar shift, as the number of people who have used the substance rose from four percent in 1969 to 47 percent over five decades later. “In 2024, nearly half of Americans now have at least used marijuana one time, and the percentage who say they are using it right now is also near record highs,” Enten said. Tying the issue to Trump,...

title: Why Fantasy Managers Must Start Mike Evans in Week 16
content: Mike Evans is back, healthy, and brings huge upside, making him a must-start in Week 16. He led the team in both receptions and yardage, demonstrating he was fully involved in the offense right out of the gate. He totaled 19.2 fantasy points, proving that he remains one of the most reliable and explosive players in the NFL. title: Legal expert says accused Whitehall councilman doesn't have to step down
content: Whitehall City Council is considering the removal of Councilman Gerald Dixon from his elected position as he faces serious criminal charges.Dixon was arrested Gerald Dixon said he's not resigning from Whitehall City Council one day after police arrested him on sex charges. Whitehall City Council is considering the removal of Councilman Gerald Dixon from his elected position as he faces serious criminal charges. Dixon was arrested last week on charges of gross sexual imposition and compelling prostitution involving minors. Rob Barnhart, a professor at Capital Law School and former Franklin County prosecutor and defense attorney, explained the implications for Dixon. "Anything he says is fair game for investigation, for use against him at a trial," said Barnhart, who is not involved in the Dixon investigation. While the council is expected to ask Dixon to step down at meeting Tuesday night, Barnhart noted that Dixon is not obligated to do so. "They have to call for a vote, they have to have a presentation of evidence, they have to give the council person an opportunity to defend themselves," Barnhart said. He added that Dixon faces a difficult decision: whether to remain silent or participate in his defense, as anything he says could be used against him."If you say something that's even inaccurate and it can be later proven that it was inaccurate, that will be used against you to paint you as a liar," Barnhart warned.A Columbus man was sentenced to life in prison for the...

title: Lemon Meringue Pie With Graham Cracker Crust
content: A few drops of fragrant, citrusy Fiori di Sicilia and a fluffy whipped topping take this classic lemon meringue pie to the next level. Chef Dominick Lee adapted this lemon meringue pie from an icebox version his grandmother used to make. It’s infused with the delicate, citrusy fragrance of Fiori di Sicilia, or “Flowers of Sicily.” The extract is inspired by the Italian island’s abundant citrus groves, accented with a hint of vanilla. It’s highly concentrated, so a little goes a long way toward adding complex fruit and floral notes to baked goods and desserts. Look for it in the baking aisle of your local specialty grocer, or buy it online from King Arthur Baking. To ensure the Italian meringue whips up properly, wipe your tools down with white vinegar. Even a trace of oily residue can prevent the egg whites from aerating. You can use store-bought pie crust if you’d like, but we recommend our brown butter graham cracker crust, which lends a nutty, toasty flavor to the finished pie.Featured in “In Montreal and New Orleans, A French Holiday Celebration Endures” by Chantal Martineau and Kayla Stewart in the Fall/Winter 2025 issue. title: Driver arrested after sending truck airborne, crashing into nearby light pole
content: A Santa Clara man was arrested after he sent his truck airborne while attempting to flee from police and crashing into a light pole.Christopher Eduardo Montero A Santa Clara man was arrested after he sent his truck airborne while attempting to flee from police and crashing into a light pole. Christopher Eduardo Montero, 24, was arrested on Sunday and charged with felony DUI and failure to stop at the command of police. He was also charged with misdemeanor charges of driving without an interlock system, being an alcohol restricted driver, failure to comply with duties at a vehicle incident and driving on a revoked license. According to court documents, Montero was behind the wheel of a black Ford F-150 that was "skidding and swerving" out of a parking lot of a St. George bar. Officers in the area quickly responded and attempted to pull the truck over. The Ford fled and struck a roundabout near 200 North and Main Street. A St. George police officer reported the truck "went airborne" but continued to drive until it crashed after striking a light pole and a wall.Two killed, one arrested in suspected DUI crash on I-15 in Salt Lake CityThe St. George Police Department noted Montero swayed from side to side as he stood, had red and watery eyes and a lethargic expression while interacting with officers. title: 美 AI 인프라 전력 및 환경 리스크, 본격적 정치 이슈로 부상
content: 공유하기 [디지털데일리 이상일기자] 미국 상원의 민주당 의원들이 인공지능(AI) 및 클라우드 데이터센터의 전력 소비 급증과 이에 따른 전기요금 상승 문제를 공식적으로 제기했다. 12월16일(현지시간) 상원 에너지·환경 관련 민주당 의원들은 주요 클라우드 및 AI 기업, 전력회사에 데이터센터 운영이 전력망 안정성과 소비자 요금에 미치는 영향을 보고하라는 조사 요구 서한을 발송했다. 뉴욕타임즈에 따르면 의원들은 서한에서 대형 데이터센터, 특히 AI 연산을 위한 전용 인프라의 전력 수요가 급증하면서 지역 전력망과 요금 체계에 부담을 주고 있다고 지적했다. 이에 따라 각 기업에 ▲현재 및 향후 전력 사용량 추정 ▲전력 인프라 확충 계획 ▲소비자 요금 영향 ▲재생에너지 사용 및 탄소 배출 관리 방안 등을 상세히 제출할 것을 요구했다. 상원 의원들은 “AI 중심 데이터센터 확장이 기후 목표와 소비자 보호에 어떤 영향을 미치는지 명확한 데이터가 필요하다”며, 향후 관련 규제 입법이나 공공요금 심사 과정에서 데이터센터 전력 사용을 별도로 다룰 수 있음을 시사했다. 이로써 AI 인프라의 전력 및 환경 리스크가 본격적인 정치 이슈로 부상했다는 평가가 나온다. 이번 움직임은 유럽연합(EU)에서 이미 논의 중인 에너지 효율, 수자원 사용, 전력 우선순위 배분 등 데이터센터 규제 강화 흐름과 궤를 같이한다. 미국에서도 AI 인프라가 에너지·기후 정책의 핵심 변수로 다뤄지기 시작했다는 점에서 의미가 크다. 업계는 전력 사용의...
