State Route 113, Bellevue, OH 44811News 5 reached out to Family Dollar, which confirmed the closures in Deerfield Township and Ohio City, stating that their leases are expiring naturally. However, the company has not provided a list of any other stores closing at the end of 2025.The closures come just months after Family Dollar's parent company, Dollar Tree, sold the chain to private equity for $1 billion in July. Dollar Tree acquired Family Dollar for more than $8 billion in 2015.According to Family Dollar's website, the company currently operates about 7,331 stores nationwide, including 385 locations in Ohio.Last year, News 5 reported on the closure of 35 Family Dollar stores across Ohio. title: Northeast Ohio students' handcrafted Menorah shines at VP JD Vance’s Hanukkah Reception
content: Anchor at News 5 Cleveland A handcrafted menorah, decorated by students from Northeast Ohio, took center stage at a Hanukkah reception hosted Monday night by Vice President JD Vance and Second Lady Usha Vance at their official residence on the grounds of the United States Naval Observatory. 'Somebody, either at his office or some connection that he had or that his office had, suggested that the menorah at his reception should be created by children with special needs from Ohio,' said Rabbi Yossi Morozov, executive director of Friendship Circle of Cleveland. 'It was on short notice. It was on a Monday afternoon that I got the call, and they said it's got to be ready by Thursday.'Friendship Circle of Cleveland quickly called upon the help of students from the Kulanu Hebrew School program and the Joseph & Florence Mandel Jewish Day School, and they delivered.The menorah, glitter and all, shone bright at the reception, sitting on a table next to Vance as he addressed guests.'This was actually built by some special needs kids in my home state of Cleveland, Ohio, not my home city, no offense to Clevelanders, but I love it very much,' Vance said. 'And, I think it's a great thing to have something that is made by people who really love it and really know the meaning of it. And now we have it here to celebrate...'Last week, News 5 captured video as kids designed the menorah. About two dozen played a role in its creation.The religious symbol represents the eternal light of God,...

District Attorney Nathan Hochman said his office has not yet determined whether it would seek death or life without the possibility of parole.Nick Reiner was arrested Monday in Exposition Park in connection with the stabbing deaths of his parents, according to Los Angeles police. title: Wall Street slips as oil prices keep dropping
content: The U.S. stock market drifted through a mixed day of trading after reports on the economy did little to clear uncertainty about where interest rates may be heading The U.S. stock market drifted through a mixed day of trading Tuesday after reports on the economy did little to clear uncertainty about where interest rates may be heading. The Standard & Poor's 500 slipped 0. 2% and remains a bit below its all-time high set last week. The Dow Jones industrial average dipped 302 points, or 0.6%, and the Nasdaq composite rose 0.2%. Treasury yields eased in the bond market after one report said the U.S. unemployment rate was at its worst level since 2021, but employers also added more jobs last month than economists expected. A separate report, meanwhile, said an underlying measure of strength for revenue at U.S. retailers grew more in October than economists expected. The mixed data meant little change in traders’ hopes that the Federal Reserve may continue to cut interest rates further in 2026. What the Fed does with interest rates is a top driver for financial markets because lower rates can boost the economy and prices for investments, even if they also may worsen inflation. A report coming on Thursday will show how bad inflation was last month, and economists expect it to show prices for U.S. consumers continue to rise faster than anyone would like. A report released on Tuesday after U.S. stocks began trading suggested price pressures are rising sharply, with average selling...

title: Dolphins considering QB change after Tua Tagovailoa's struggles
content: Miami Dolphins coach Mike McDaniel is considering a quarterback change after Tua Tagovailoa's continued struggles this season. Tagovailoa threw for just 65 yards through three quarters, and the areas in which he has appeared to regress were evident again, from questionable decision-making to a lack of mobility that has hampered him throughout the season. “The quarterback play last night was not good enough," McDaniel said Tuesday,"and so for me, everything is on the table.”McDaniel said he would give “more clarity” on his quarterback decision on Wednesday. Miami's other quarterbacks are Zach Wilson, who has been Tagovailoa's backup most of the season, and rookie Quinn Ewers. “We're in the process of game planning for the Cincinnati Bengals,” McDaniel said, “so in that process we're trying to determine who will give us the best chance to win.” The Dolphins’ slim postseason hopes slipped away for good in frigid Pittsburgh on Monday — this after a four-game winning streak had briefly resurrected their season hopes and pulled them out of the 1–6 hole they dug to start the year.There are three games left, but for a franchise carrying the league’s longest playoff-win drought, the focus should immediately shift to making sure they don’t find themselves in this same position for a third straight season. That begins with answering the question of whether they are best suited to win high-stakes games with Tagovailoa, who signed a four-year, $212.4 million contract extension in July...

title: Landslide to nightmare
content: The most important stories for you to know today Lisa Gladstone describes Rancho Palos Verdes as “heaven on Earth.” But that heaven soon became a living hell for the 72-year-old when unprecedented land movement made her home unlivable. The nightmare didn’t end there. Despite qualifying for federal relief dollars, Gladstone describes the arduous process of trying to stop U.S. Bank from beginning foreclosure proceedings on her home.Gov. Gavin Newsom declared an emergency in the Portuguese Bend area of Rancho Palos Verdes, where unprecedented land movement has forced utilities to shut off power and gas for hundreds of residents. The city also announced a buyout program for homes damaged by the landslides in 2024. Gladstone applied for the buyout. But one of the conditions for the buyout program: Your home can't be in foreclosure proceedings.unprecedented land movement . So in a last-ditch effort to salvage what they could, she and her husband took out an $80,000 loan to have crews cut their house in half to keep the part on moving land from dragging the whole house with it.was announced for residents who lost their homes, they immediately applied. But there was a catch: To qualify, homes can’t be in foreclosure proceedings, and U.S. Bank had started knocking, telling the 72-year-old and her husband they needed to come up with $44,000 by Christmas Day to make the mortgage current. “ When we get the FEMA funds, we would pay off the mortgage, and we would have enough money that we...

title: How Shedeur Sanders is still in the mix as Browns’ QB of the future despite 3-interception setback: Mary Kay
content: Shedeur Sanders is still in the mix as the Browns' QB of the future despite his three interceptions Sunday against the Bears. How Shedeur Sanders is still in the mix as Browns’ QB of the future despite 3-interception setback: Mary Kay CabotCLEVELAND, Ohio — The Browns knew that Shedeur Sanders might have a clunker of a game this season, and his rough outing during Sunday’s 31-3 loss to the Bears doesn’t eliminate him from the starting mix for next season. The key for Sanders, who fell to 1-3 following his three-interception game, is to rebound Sunday at home against the 10-4 Bills, and build on his historic game from two weeks ago in the 31-29 loss to the Titans. He must also finish strong against the Steelers and Bengals to convince the Browns they don’t need to draft a quarterback with one or both of their two first round picks, currently No. 4 and No. 28. In the Titans game, Sanders bolstered his case to show the Browns he can be their franchise QB, becoming the first Brown with at least 300 yards and three passing TDs, and a rushing score.Breaking bad habits: Inside Shedeur Sanders’ development struggles as Browns rookie QB faces growing painsBut he regressed against the Bears, going 18 of 35 for 177 yards with no touchdowns and three interceptions en route to a 30.3 rating. He was also sacked five times and hit a total 15. He was strip-sacked once, but officials ruled that his forward progress had been stopped, and the Browns punted. “The sky’s not falling,” Kevin...

title: Two cuffed for deadly Times Square stabbing that claimed Rhode Island man's life

title: Why GM Is Quietly Shutting Multiple Plants For Over A Month
content: Extended shutdowns at key GM sites hint at bigger changes ahead, with one upgrade possibly tied to a next-gen engine GM will pause Flint plant production from December 24 to January 26. Chevrolet Silverado HD and GMC Sierra HD builds will be affected. Bowling Green’s Corvette plant also faces an unusually long pause. General Motors will temporarily shut down its Flint Assembly plant in Michigan for over a month during the Christmas and New Year holiday period, but the reason isn’t what you might expect. Rather than responding to a drop in demand, the automaker is preparing for substantial work at the facility. The Flint Assembly site currently handles production of the Chevrolet Silverado HD and GMC Sierra HD. The plant will be taken offline on December 24, and production will be halted until January 26, 2026. Read: GM Drops Another Half A Billion To Make More Gas Cars In America It’s normal for this plant to have an extended break over the holiday season, but typically it doesn’t last quite this long. Why the Downtime? In a statement provided to GM Authority, the company said, “Flint Assembly will take extended holiday downtime to complete planned maintenance and project work.” While that sounds straightforward enough, GM didn’t elaborate on what the so-called “project work” involves. One possibility is preparation for the introduction of GM’s Gen 6 small block V8 engine, which is expected to launch with the 2027 model year. That would align with the timing, though for now...

title: Greenfield father arrested after toddler found outside in diaper in cold weather
content: A 20-year-old Greenfield man is facing felony charges after his toddler was found wandering outside wearing only a diaper in freezing temperatures Monday afternoon. GREENFIELD — A 20-year-old Greenfield man is facing felony charges after his toddler was found wandering outside wearing only a diaper in freezing temperatures Monday afternoon.According to the Greenfield Police Department, officers got a call around 3 p. m. about a small child outside at the Prairie Meadows apartment complex. When officers arrived, they found the little one suffering from hypothermia and quickly got them into a warm patrol car. The toddler was rushed to an Indianapolis hospital and is in stable condition. Upon further investigation, police followed tiny footprints in the snow, indicating the child had been walking around outside. Those footprints led officers right to an apartment on Switchgrass Drive, where the front door was wide open.When police went inside and called out, nobody answered. They went on to conduct a security check and found 20-year-old Logan Nickolas fast asleep on the couch. Nickolas told officers the child was his and lived there with him.While they were talking to Nickolas, officers said they saw what looked like illegal drugs and drug paraphernalia sitting out in the open.Nickolas was arrested and taken to the Hancock County Jail. He's facing two felony charges for child neglect - one for causing bodily injury and another for putting the child in danger. The Department of...

title: Why the NBA Is Defending the In-Season Tournament Amid Criticism of Early Injuries
content: The NBA Cup TV ratings have jumped and players have embraced the competition, so killing the event would be too simplistic to address concerns. connecting the league’s NBA Cup schedule to the rash of early-season soft tissue injuries—a story that was also published in print by its parent company,—the league fired off a rare public rebuke. The article’s conclusions, the NBA said, are “not supported by data. ” The league pointed out that the number of games played this season is roughly the same as last season, while injuries to star players were down by 25%. Any connections between games played and injuries, an NBA spokesman wrote, were “patently false.” The story, clearly, struck a nerve. Well, a couple, really. For years, league officials have been sensitive to criticism of scheduling. The NBA has taken steps to reduce player workloads—slashing the number of back-to-backs, reducing miles traveled, introducing so-called “baseball series” where two teams play in the same city twice, etc.—but cramming 82 games into 174 days is grueling, more so with the pace of play increasing to record levels. The only way toThen there is the criticism of the Cup. The NBA is quite proud of its creation, part of a yearslong effort to increase interest in the regular season while creating another revenue stream. content: Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, Los Angeles County prosecutors said Tuesday.N by ANDREW DALTON and CHRISTOPHER WEBER Associated PressADDITION ADDS MAIDEN NAME: FILE - Rob Reiner and Michele Singer Reiner arrive on the red carpet at the State Department for the Kennedy Center Honors gala dinner, Dec. 2, 2023, in Washington. Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, Los Angeles County prosecutors said Tuesday. Nick Reiner, 32, will be charged in the death of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner, District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell. Prosecutors plan to file the charges, two counts of first degree murder special circumstances of multiple murders, later Tuesday. They will also include a special allegation that he used a dangerous weapon, a knife. The announcement of the charges came two days after the couple was found dead from apparent stab wounds in their home in the upscale Brentwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. Nick Reiner was arrested on suspicion of the killing and jailed hours later. title: Man vs. Baby Soars to Number One on Netflix Global Charts
content: Rowan Atkinson's latest comedy, Man vs. Baby, a follow-up to Man vs. Bee, has become a global hit on Netflix, captivating audiences with its holiday-themed chaos and physical comedy. The show quickly rose to number one on Netflix's global charts, demonstrating its widespread appeal. Man vs. Baby, the latest British comedy series from Netflix , has quickly ascended to the top of the streaming giant's global charts, claiming the number one spot. Released on December 11th, the series serves as a follow-up to the 2022 release Man vs. Bee, and sees the return of comedy icon Rowan Atkinson , famed for his roles as Mr. Bean and Johnny English, as Trevor Bingley. The show's success is undeniable, evidenced by its impressive performance in the Global Top 10 rankings for the week of December 8th to 14th, where it garnered 19.1 million views and a staggering 37.6 million hours viewed. This placed it above a competitive field including titles such as Sean Combs: The Reckoning season 1, and various seasons of the immensely popular Stranger Things. The series, co-created by Atkinson alongside William Davies, the writer of the Johnny English franchise, shifts the comedic focus from bees to babies, as Trevor Bingley finds himself in a new situation. The plot centers on Trevor settling into a quieter life, working as a school caretaker. title: Bill to transform public transit in Illinois signed into law. Here's what is included
content: After years of “fiscal cliffs and “doomsday scenarios,” Chicago transit now has a financial lifeline from Springfield. The newly-signed legislation calls for $1.5 billion in new annual transit funding, which will come, in part, from redirecting the state fuel sales tax. After years of “fiscal cliffs and “doomsday scenarios,” Chicago transit now has a financial lifeline from Springfield. On Tuesday at Union Station, Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker signed a sweeping transit bill designed to modernize public transportation throughout the state, but especially in the Chicago area.The bill, which passed with mostly Democratic support, would replace the Regional Transportation Authority with a new body called the Northern Illinois Transit Authority. The NITA would have expanded authority over the CTA, Metra and Pace. The newly-signed legislation calls for $1.5 billion in new annual transit funding, which will come, in part, from redirecting the state fuel sales tax to fund transit. The change is expected to bring in about $860 million annually. Cook County Board President Toni Preckwinkle called the measure"essential to our economic vitality and quality of life.” Other funds will come from a quarter percent RTA sales tax increase in Cook, Lake, McHenry, DuPage and Will counties.“Communities can stop worrying about whether service can survive from one year to the next and start focusing on serving people better.” Said Laura Calderone, executive director of the Illinois Public...

content: LOS ANGELES — Legendary director Rob Reiner and his longtime wife have been found stabbed to death inside their Brentwood home and investigators are eyeing the couple’s troubled adult son as a person of interest, according to law enforcement sources. Jordan Belfort has shared a touching video that Rob Reiner sent to his father, Max Belfort, before his death six years ago. Reiner famously played Max in Martin Scorsese’s 2013 biopic “The Wolf of Wall Street,” which saw Leonardo DiCaprio star as the former stockbroker-turned-financial criminal. “Hey, Mr. Belfort. It’s Rob Reiner, I played you in the movie. It was a privilege,” the late “Stand by Me” director“Got to know your son and I know he’s with you now and everybody that you love is with you now,” Reiner added. “And I just wanted to say hi and you gave me a great thrill to be able to play you in the film.”'Stunned' Jane Fonda recalls Rob Reiner's final night at Conan O'Brien's Christmas party before murders“Rob Reiner sent this to my father on his death bed,” Jordan, 63, wrote. “Truly a class act. RIP.”“The Wolf of Wall Street” was based on Jordan’s 2007 memoir of the same name and starred Reiner and DiCaprio alongside Jonah Hill, Margot Robbie, Matthew McConaughey and Kyle Chandler. title: 'Five Nights at Freddy's 2' Scares Off Nicole Kidman's Twisty Horror Movie at the Box Office
content: Nicole Kidman looking shocked in The Others. The hit film Five Nights at Freddy's 2 has now overtaken a movie that was released before most of its target audience was even born. The horror sequel is aimed at younger crowds, as was its predecessor, which shocked the industry and grossed nearly $300 million worldwide a couple of years ago. Directed by Emma Tammi, both Five Nights at Freddy's movies have received poor reviews, but this hasn't affected their box office performance in the least. The new film is now on the verge of passing the coveted $100 million mark at the domestic box office, having already overtaken a handful of past and recent hits. Besides fellow Blumhouse horror sequel Black Phone 2, the movie has now overtaken the $96 million lifetime domestic haul of The Others. Released in 2001, the movie made a splash at the box office and earned positive reviews. But it has somehow slipped through the fingers of public consciousness in the two-and-a-half decades since. The Others is now mostly remembered for its shocking twist ending, which has to be among the best of its era, perhaps alongside those of M. Night Shyamalan's The Sixth Sense, which debuted two years prior, and Frank Darabont's The Mist, which would roll into theaters five years later. Directed by Alejandro Amenábar, The Others featured Nicole Kidman in the lead role, and grossed more than $200 million worldwide against a reported budget of $17 million. title: Exodus (EXOD) joins stablecoin race with MoonPay-backed digital dollar
content: The public crypto wallet firm joins Circle and PayPal in issuing stablecoins. Exodus is launching a fully reserved, USD-backed stablecoin with MoonPay to power self-custodial payments in its crypto wallet app. The stablecoin will support Exodus Pay, a new feature enabling users to spend and send digital dollars without relying on centralized exchanges. With the launch, Exodus joins a short list of public companies, including PayPal and Circle, backing stablecoin products. Crypto wallet provider Exodus is entering the stablecoin market with the launch of a fully reserved, USD-backed stablecoin in partnership with fintech firm MoonPay. MoonPay will issue and manage the stablecoin, with support from stablecoin infrastructure provider M0. The token is expected to go live in January 2026, with network and product details to follow. The move places Exodus among a small group of public companies behind stablecoin products, including Circle , PayPal and Fiserv ., which aims to offer everyday payments in crypto without sacrificing self-custody. Users will be able to spend and send the digital dollar through the Exodus app while earning rewards and avoiding the complexity of typical crypto transactions. “Stablecoins are quickly becoming the simplest way for people to hold and move dollars onchain,” said JP Richardson, co-founder and CEO at Exodus. “But the experience still needs to meet the expectations set by today’s consumer apps.” In practice, this could look like a user sending...

title: Former Wayne County Basketball Coach Avoids Prison After Pleading Guilty to Sex Act
content: A former Lyons Central School District basketball coach, Dean Schott II, was sentenced to probation after pleading guilty to a third-degree criminal sexual act. The charges stemmed from an inappropriate relationship with a student. The Wayne County District Attorney's Office highlighted the importance of accountability for those who abuse their positions of trust. Dean Schott II, a 55-year-old former high school basketball coach, faced legal consequences after pleading guilty to a third-degree criminal sexual act . The events leading to this case began in August 2025, when Schott was booked into the Wayne County Jail. This followed allegations of misconduct stemming from April 2019, targeting a former student. Schott, who was a long-time employee of the Lyons Central School District, serving for 22 years and holding the position of boys varsity basketball coach, saw his career and reputation irrevocably damaged by these accusations. The school district acted swiftly after receiving a report on April 8 alleging an inappropriate relationship between Schott and a student. In response, the district stated that Schott resigned immediately, and further investigation found no evidence implicating any current students in the matter. This decisive action by the district underscored their commitment to the safety and well-being of its students, prioritizing the resolution of this critical issue. title: Indy volleyball coach in viral video charged after allegedly sending explicit images to minor
content: Indianapolis volleyball coach Levi Garrett, who was confronted by YouTuber JiDion in a viral video, has been charged after allegedly sending explicit images to a minor. INDIANAPOLIS — A viral video has led to criminal charges against an Indianapolis volleyball coach accused of sending sexually explicit images to someone he believed was a 14-year-old boy.Marion County Prosecutor Ryan Mears announced that Levi Garrett, 34, of Danville, faces attempted dissemination of matter harmful to minors, a Level 6 felony, following an independent investigation by the prosecutor's office. According to the probable cause affidavit, the charges stem from allegations that on March 2, 2025, Garrett engaged in explicit conversations and sent sexually graphic photos on the dating app Grindr to someone he believed was a minor.A member of a private online investigative organization used a fake Grindr profile titled 'tryna have fun' with a photo portraying themselves as a 14-year-old male named 'Josh.' The decoy allegedly engaged with Garrett's profile, 'Hmu & find out.' During the conversation, court documents show the minor texted Garrett, 'U mind if I'm young,' and Garrett replied, 'No I don't mind.' When the decoy told Garrett, 'I'm 14 but I down for whatever,' Garrett allegedly 'liked' the message and proceeded to send three sexually explicit images, including photos of male genitalia and sexual activity.The messages also allegedly included language about meeting for sex, with Garrett asking...

title: 'The Pitt' season two trailer is here with fireworks, malfunctions, and more Noah Wyle
content: “The Pitt” is back in action for a season set over the Fourth of July, with returning faces and a few newcomers. The new trailer dropped today, kicking off with Emmy-winner Noah Wyle’s Dr. Robby muttering, “And so it begins” as he enters the ER at the Pittsburgh Trauma Medical Center. We see some familiar faces returning, like nurse Dana Evans who was rethinking her whole career after she was punched in the face by a disgruntled patient last season. There’s also the return of Dr. Frank Langdon fresh out of rehab but on thin ice with his mentor, Dr. Robby.Langdon finishes w/ Randall & Donahue finishes w/ Hansens. There’s also fan favorite Dr. Mel King and our trio of newbies from the first season, Dr. Trinity Santos , Dennis Whittaker and Victoria Javadi , as well as the more experienced doctors on the floor, Dr. Samira Mohan and Dr. Cassie McKay .Season two’s shift takes place over the Fourth of July, but even with all the explosives, that might be the least of the Pitt team’s problems. There’s also a drill that shuts down all the computers , meaning they’ll be working analog . The Fourth of July cannot be the best day to run that kind of drill!Tensions are also high between Robby, who’s working one last shift before he goes on a sabbatical, and his temporary replacement, Dr. Baran Al-Hashimi . She’s got ideas to improve the department, but given the chaos on a regular basis, can she really pull it off? .A Columbus man was sentenced to life in prison for the murder of...

title: Empress cicada wings repurposed as powerful low cost SERS substrates
content: Dec 16, 2025 Empress cicada wings repurposed as powerful low cost SERS substrates Silver coated nanospikes on empress cicada wings amplify Raman signals by up to a million times, offering a scalable low cost route to sensitive molecular detection. ( Nanowerk News ) Zoom in far enough on an empress cicada wing, and a strange landscape materializes. At the nanoscale, densely packed spires rise from the surface, covering the wing in an endless grove of bowling pins. These spires, though, are more than just an eerie sight. The highly ordered, evenly spaced spikes can be modified to act as an optical metamaterial, using their tiny geometry to modify interactions between light waves and matter. In AIP Advances ( "SERS enhancement via biotemplated Ag nanostructures on empress cicada wings: Effects of sputtering and e-gun deposition on gap geometry" ), researchers from China Medical University and National Taiwan University showed that these natural nanostructures can be tuned to amplify signals in molecular detection techniques. The nanostructures of an empress cicada wing before and after being coated with silver nanoparticles. (Image: Hong et al.) The scientists were interested in using the cicada wing structure to improve surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy (SERS) . Standard Raman spectroscopy illuminates a molecule with a laser beam and collects the unique spectrum of scattered light, which acts as a molecular fingerprint. However, the scattered light signal is often weak,...

title: Why Father Jud Did That To Wake Up Dead Man's Killer Explained By Star Josh O'Connor
content: Father Jud (Josh O'Connor) looking at the dead body in Wake Up Dead Man Warning: There are spoilers ahead for Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery.Josh O'Connor explains why his character, Father Jud Duplenticy, takes the confession of Martha Delacroix at the end of Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery. Martha is the mastermind behind the murder of Monsignor Jefferson Wicks in the third Knives Out movie. After Martha consumes a dose of lethal tranquilizer, she intends to die with her sins. Despite her sins, including letting Jud be framed for Wicks' death, Jud gives Martha last rites and listens to her confession before she dies. While speaking with Tudum, O'Connor explains that Jud does this because of his core principles as a priest. He wants to understand Martha before she dies, which is different from agreeing with or justifying what she has done. Check out O'Connor's comments below: That scene cuts to what Jud’s principles are — and I share them. It’s his attempt to try and understand her. It doesn’t mean that he has to agree with her. It’s much easier to point the finger. But there’s a lot to be said for trying to understand someone’s truth or psyche. If we could do a little bit more of that, it might solve some of our issues. In terms of what Jud's overarching principles are, O'Connor believes that they "are to do with forgiveness, doubt, and uncertainty. He believes in a loving God, a God that sees your faults and chooses to love them.” These principles are a...

title: Am I a Masochist for Going Back to Workouts I Hate?
content: There’s science behind your most miserable routines. I tried Solidcore—a high-intensity workout class on a Pilates-inspired reformer—for the first time in 2023. I spent all 50 minutes cursing under my breath, convinced that my muscles were ripping apart. I hated it. And yet after it ended, I immediately booked my next class. A quick scroll through Instagram and TikTok proves I’m not the only one addicted to the grueling workout. Every December, Solidcore hosts the “Solidays Challenge,” in which members commit to taking 10 classes over 15 days; in return, they get an exclusive mockneck sweatshirt along with products from Salt & Stone. This year nearly one-third of members opted in, Athletech News reported, a 65% increase from 2024. Over the past five years, Google searches for Solidcore have steadily risen—and are currently at their highest of all time. Yet even amidst its widespread popularity, devotees of the cult workout still complain about the pain of the class. “It’s so hard that it’s borderline uncomfortable—but in the best way,” notes one TikTok user. Solidcore isn’t the only rigorous workout gaining traction. In its 2025 report, ClassPass noted that searches for Hyrox classes increased 432% year over year. Hyrox, a global fitness competition that combines running and resistance training, was previously referred to by one expert as “the marathon of functional fitness.” Another indication of the rising popularity of high-intensity workouts: Barry’s, the bootcamp-style...

title: Nick Reiner charged with first-degree murder in parents' killing, District Attorney says
content: Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced the charges filed on Tuesday. by ALEXX ALTMAN-DEVILBISS & CAITLYN FROLO | The National News DeskADDITION ADDS MAIDEN NAME: FILE - Rob Reiner and Michele Singer Reiner arrive on the red carpet at the State Department for the Kennedy Center Honors gala dinner, Dec. 2, 2023, in Washington. Nick Reiner has officially been charged with first-degree murder in the deaths of his father, Rob Reiner, and mother, Michele. Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced the charges filed on Tuesday, including two counts of first-degree murder with a special circumstance of multiple murders, as well as "fessing a special allegation that he personally used a dangerous and deadly weapon, that being a knife." The charges carry a maximum sentence of life in prison or the death penalty. Hochman said no decision has been made on the death penalty as of now. Nick Reiner will be brought to court for an arraignment after he is medically cleared, where he would then enter a plea of "guilty" or "not guilty." His defense attorney, Alan Jackson, said Tuesday that his client will likely miss his first court appearance because he still needs medical clearance following his arrest on suspicion of murdering his parents, according to CNN. Hochman told the media on Tuesday that every individual being booked into the Los Angeles court system goes through the medical clearance process. Prosecuting these cases involving family members...

title: Michelle Obama says she, husband 'were supposed to be seeing' Rob Reiner, Michele on night of murder
content: Michelle Obama shared that she and her husband, former President Barack Obama, had plans to see their longtime friends Rob Reiner and Michele Singer the night of their untimely and tragic deaths. The former first lady opened up about the pair during an appearance on "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" on Monday, taking a moment to pay her respects to the late filmmaker and his wife. "We've known them for many, many years. And we were supposed to be seeing them that night, last night, and we got the news," she said. "And let me just say this, unlike some people, Rob and Michele Reiner are some of the most decent, courageous people you ever want to know."The former first lady's comments came hours after President Donald Trump receivedabout Rob Reiner's death, which he claimed was "reportedly due to the anger he caused by others through his massive, unyielding, and incurable affliction ... known as TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME." The president called Reiner "a tortured and struggling, but once very talented movie director and comedy star." Trump's remarks have drawn criticism from politicians on both sides of the aisle, including New York Rep. Mike Lawler, a Republican, who called the post "wrong," fellow Republican Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky, who called the post "inappropriate," and Senate Democratic leader Chuck Schumer, who wrote in a social media post that the president "knows no shame." In stark contrast to Trump's remarks, Obama told Kimmel on Monday that Rob Reiner and his wife have...

title: Seahawks Rookie Snap Count Dips in Week 15 as Zabel Struggles
content: The Seattle Seahawks' rookie class saw a significant decrease in playing time during Week 15 due to injuries and inactive players. Grey Zabel, an offensive guard, had a particularly challenging performance, especially in pass protection, while facing issues in both pass and run blocking. The Seattle Seahawks rookie snap count dropped significantly in Week 15, with the group combining for 137 total snaps. That decrease is largely explained by two offensive rookies landing on Injured Reserve , Rylie Mills being eased back in with fewer than 10 snaps after a long injury absence, and Robbie Ouzts being a somewhat unexpected inactive. In total, only four rookies saw the field, and just two played more than 10 snaps. As a result, the All-22 review is heavily centered on Grey Zabel and Nick Emmanwori. Grey Zabel — Offensive Guard From an All-22 perspective, this was Zabel’s roughest outing of the season in pass protection, allowing four pressures — matching his Week 2 performance against Pittsburgh. The struggles were not isolated; Charles Cross also had one of his least effective games of the year, and several of Zabel’s losses came in situations where the left side failed to function cohesively. In the run game, Zabel still flashed the traits that made him a Day 1 pick. He was effective at times on first-level blocks, generating displacement or taking efficient angles. The recurring issue showed up on second-level execution. Zabel was late climbing or failed to square up...

Microsoft released the latest Wireless Headset as an accessory for Xbox Series X/S and PC, but as of this update, Xbox Wireless Headset owners on Windows will now have a leg up on their console counterparts thanks to support for Bluetooth Low Energy Audio. Microsoft says that supporting Bluetooth LE Audio will let the headset offer lower latency audio, better battery life, richer stereo sound and the ability to share audio across multiple compatible Bluetooth accessories at the same time. Not revolutionary updates, but still nice to have if you bought a $110 Xbox Wireless Headset back in 2024. Provided you're running the latest version of Windows 11 and your device supports Bluetooth LE, Microsoft says you can take advantage of the improvements by updating your headset in the Xbox Accessories app. If you're a regular user of the Xbox mobile app, Microsoft is also making some changes there. title: Rob Reiner’s son to be charged with 2 counts of murder in killing of his parents
content: Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, Los Angeles County prosecutors said Tuesday. Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, Los Angeles County prosecutors said Tuesday.Nick Reiner, 32, will be charged in the death of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner, District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell. The announcement of the charges came two days after the couple was found dead from apparent stab wounds in their home in the upscale Brentwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. Nick Reiner was arrested on suspicion of the killing and jailed hours later.Nick Reiner had been expected to make an initial court appearance earlier Tuesday, but his attorney Alan Jackson said he was not brought from the jail to the courthouse for medical reasons and the appearance would not come before Wednesday.Jackson did not comment further on the case, and Nick Reiner has not yet entered a plea.Rob Reiner was the Emmy-winning star of the sitcom “All in the Family” who went on to direct films including “When Harry Met Sally...” and “The Princess Bride.” He was an outspoken liberal activist for decades. Michele Singer Reiner was a photographer, movie producer and advocate for LGBTQ+ rights. They had been married for 36 years.Representatives for the Reiner family...

title: Snow Man 2年連続6冠達成の快挙
CARA A CARA
content: Quem é melhor na final do Mundial: Marquinhos ou Léo Pereira? Arrascaeta ou Kvaratskhelia? No Cara a Cara, é você quem escala os craques de Fla e PSG e ainda compara tudo com a opinião dos nossos colunistas. Jogue abaixo: Essa é a sua chance de montar um supertime com os melhores dos campeões da Libertadores e da Champions League, que se encaram na quarta (17), às 14h (de Brasília). Não entendeu o jogo? A gente explica: em cada posição, você escolhe entre astros dos dois times em uma lista só com quem está liberado pra decisão; o craque Hakimi, do PSG, por exemplo, está machucado e nem viajou pro Qatar, por isso não aparece entre as opções. E você vai poder até ousar e improvisar alguém fora da posição de origem! No Cara a Cara, você define o esquema tático, escolhe jogadores, treinador e monta seu time totalmente personalizado. Depois, compara com as escalações de colunistas como PVC, Julio Gomes, Rafael Reis e outros nomes do UOL. E tem mais: o game ainda mostra com qual colunista você tem mais ou menos "match", ou seja, quem escalou mais jogadores iguais aos seus (e quem não tem nada a ver com o seu estilo). Chegou a hora de você responder: você é #TimeBrunoHenrique ou #TimeDembelé no ataque? Entre no Cara a Cara, monte seu Flamengo x PSG perfeito e veja quem pensa futebol igualzinho a você!

title: ACC to Revise Tiebreaker Rules in 2026 After Duke’s Surprise Appearance in Conference Title
content: The league's tiebreaker rules allowed 7–5 Duke to reach the ACC title this season. The Atlantic Coast Conference announced its 2026 conference opponents for each member institution on Tuesday afternoon, and buried in that release was an important piece of news.There are no details yet on what the new tiebreaker rules will be in the ACC next season, but a change coming to the rules is hardly a surprise. Duke won the ACC championship earlier this month, capping off an 8–5 campaign that included a 6–2 mark in conference play. The Blue Devilsover Miami, Georgia Tech, SMU and Pitt. Due to the lack of common opponents for the five teams involved in the tie for second-place in the ACC, the fifth tiebreaker came into play, which spotlighted the combined win percentage of conference opponents. Duke’s eight ACC opponents went 32–32 , which won the Blue Devils the tiebreak and sent the program to Charlotte to contend for the ACC title against Virginia. Duke, of course, won that game over then-ranked No. 17 Virginia. The victory knocked the Cavaliers out of the College Football Playoff and nearly knocked the ACC out of CFP consideration. Duke was not among the five highest-ranked conference champions, so the Blue Devils did not receive an automatic bid to the CFP despite winning the ACC. It took Miami’s at-large berth for the ACC to ensure a representative in the playoff. The disastrous scenario that unfolded and nearly left the ACC out of the playoff was enough for the league to...

title: A Home Game Added to Cal's 2026 ACC Football Schedule
content: ACC teams will play nine conference games starting in 2026 after playing eight conference games this season A Cal home game against Pittsburgh has been added to the Golden Bears’ 2026 schedule to satisfy the new scheduling rule approved by the ACC in September. ACC teams played eight conference games in 2025, but ACC teams will play nine conference games starting in 2026. That required each ACC team to add one conference game and eliminate one nonconference game for its 2026 season. The ACC announced the additional ACC opponent for each school on Tuesday, although the dates of those conference games has not been set yet. Cal’s new 2026 opponent is Pitt, which is 8-4 overall this season heading into its bowl game, including 6-2 in ACC play. The Bears did not face Pitt this season, but lost to the Panthers 17-15 in Pittsburgh in 2024. Cal now has the benefit of playing five ACC home games in 2026, with those home games being against Pitt, Clemson, Wake Forest, Virginia Tech and Stanford. Cal’s four ACC road games will be against North Carolina State, SMU, Syracuse and Virginia. This means Cal will not play Miami, which is the only ACC team in this year’s College Football Playoff, or Duke, this season’s ACC champion. The other five ACC team missing from Cal’s 2026 conference schedule are Louisville, Georgia Tech, Florida State, Boston College and North Carolina. This would seem to be a favorable conference schedule for Cal, although things seldom work out as expected once the...

title: Escorpión de Lizbeth Ovalle y chilena de Santiago Montiel se llevan premios de mejores goles
content: Un gol de escorpión de la mexicana Lizbeth Ovalle, la jugadora más cara en la historia del fútbol femenino, y un disparo de chilena a larga distancia del argentino Santiago Montiel ganaron el martes los premios FIFA a los mejores goles de la temporada pasada. Un gol de escorpión de la mexicana Lizbeth Ovalle, la jugadora más cara en la historia del fútbol femenino, y un disparo de chilena a larga distancia del argentino Santiago Montiel ganaron el martes los premios FIFA a los mejores goles de la temporada pasada. Ambos tenían la espalda hacia el arco al anotar los goles ganadores. Los aficionados votaron por Ovalle y Montiel para recibir el Premio Marta y el Premio Puskas, respectivamente. Ovalle definió con un sutil toque de talón en un salto en el aire de espaldas a la portería mientras jugaba en la liga mexicana para Tigres contra Guadalajara. El premio femenino lleva el nombre de Marta, la estrella brasileña que ahora es compañera de equipo de Ovalle en el Orlando Pride. Marta ganó el premio el año pasado y también tuvo un gol nominado por la FIFA para la edición de este año. “Estoy muy agradecida... desde la nominación fue un momento muy especial, y al ver tantos goles increíbles, incluído uno de Marta con quien tengo el orgullo de compartir equipo, sentí una emoción enorme', dijo Ovalle. “Cualquiera de esos golazos podía ganar, y que el mío haya sido elegido me llena de orgullo”. La “Maga” Ovalle fue transferida por un transferencia récord...

title: 'One of the most devastating disasters': Washington faces long-term recovery after floods
content: In a Tuesday press prelease, Washington governor Bob Ferguson gave an update on the current flooding situation in Washington, praising prevention and relief eff Another wave of heavy rain smacks western Washington this week, coupled with strong winds adding concern for potential power outages.Governor Bob Ferguson stressed that fundamental infrastructure has been compromised across multiple counties, and assessment and relief will not be immediate. Washington Gov. Bob Ferguson gave an update on the current flooding situation in Washington during a press conference Tuesday, praising prevention and relief efforts while warning that recovery from the damage will be long-term. "While it will be some time before we know the full scope of the emotional, physical, and financial impact, this natural disaster is undoubtedly one of the most devastating in our state's history," Ferguson said. "All Washingtonians, even those not directly impacted, need to brace themselves. We're in for the long haul with this natural disaster," the governor continued. Ferguson stressed that fundamental infrastructure has been compromised across multiple counties, and assessment and relief will not be immediate.Ferguson reported that 1,200 rescues and evacuations occurred across more than 10 counties during the eight-day series of flooding and atmospheric river conditions. The governor reinforced that Washington residents need to stay alert to the quickly-changing situation and obey road-closure signs...

title: 6 yıl once yarışma programına katılmıştı! Muhtarın cesedi varilden çıktı
content: Kocaeli'nin İzmit ilçesinde kayıp olarak aranan 64 yaşındaki Sadık Savurtaş, varil içinde ölü olarak bulundu. Jandarma olayla ilgili çok yönlü inceleme başlattı. Olay, Eseler Mahallesi'nde meydana geldi. Bugün son olarak saat 16.00 sıralarında görülen ve bir daha evine dönmeyen Eseler Mahallesi eski muhtarı Sadık Savurtaş (64) için yakınları kayıp müracatında bulundu. İhbar üzerine bölgede geniş çaplı arama çalışması başlatıldı. Jandarma, yakınları ve mahalle sakinlerinin birlikte yürüttüğü arama çalışmalarında Sadık Savurtaş, saat 20.30 sıralarında kendisine ait bahçede, varil içerisinde ölü olarak bulundu. İhbar üzerine olay yerine sağlık ekipleri de sevk edildi. Varil içindeki Sadık Savurtaş'ın yapılan kontrollerinde hayatını kaybettiği belirlendi. Uzman ekipler bölgede inceleme yaptı İl Jandarma Komutanlığı Olay Yeri İnceleme ekipleri çevrede inceleme yaptı. Cumhuriyet Savcısı da Sadık Savurtaş'ın ölü olarak bulunduğu bölgede incelemelerde bulundu. Yapılan olay yeri araştırmasının ardından Sadık Savurtaş'ın cenazesi, kesin ölüm sebebinin belirlenmesi için Adli Tıp Kurumu morguna kaldırıldı. 6 yıl önce televizyonda bilgi yarışmasına katılmışÖte yandan, çiftçilikle uğraşan Sadık Savurtaş'ın 6 yıl önce ATV'de yayınlanan 'Kim milyoner olmak ister?' isimli yarışmaya katıldığı ve bin TL kazandığı öğrenildi. Olayla ilgili çok yönlü inceleme başlatıldı.

title: Nick Reiner murder charges: What we know after deaths of Rob and Michele Reiner
content: The investigation continues over suspicions of Nick Reiner killing his parents, Rob and Michele Reiner, on Dec. 14. Authorities have announced murder charges against Nick Reiner, the son of legendary filmmaker Rob Reiner, following the shocking deaths of Reiner and his wife, Michele, in what investigators are treating as a homicide. Here’s what we know so far. Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan J. Hochman and LAPD Chief Jim McDonnell held a press conference on the case on Tuesday, Dec. 16. McDonnell announced Nick is being charged with two counts of first-degree murder with special circumstances in the death of his parents. “These are some of the most serious charges the D.A. can present against anyone,” Nathan Hochman started, “I anticipate this being a very thorough" investigation. If there is evidence of “mental illness,” it will be presented in court before a judge and jurors. Authorities say Nick "personally used a dangerous and deadly weapon, that being a knife." Nick Reiner at "Spinal Tap II: The End Continues" Los Angeles Premiere held at The Egyptian Theatre on September 09, 2025 in Los Angeles, California. Authorities are awaiting autopsy results for more information on the timeline of the murders. He faces life without parole or the death penalty if convicted on all murder counts. title: Amid the Hughes hype, Matt Kiersted makes a quiet Wild debut
content: The Minnesota Wild had a new defenseman make his debut in red and green last weekend, and hardly anyone noticed. Seriously.Amid all of the much-deserved hype about Quinn Hughes coming to Minnesota and taking his place on the Wild blue line, the local NHL club also welcomed Matt Kiersted back to his home state for his first game on the rink where every local kid dreams of playing.“There was a lot going on, but it was pretty cool,” Kiersted said on Tuesday, reflecting on his time as a youth hockey player in Elk River. “Being from Minnesota, I grew up watching the Wild. To actually get into a game, to get to play for them in the regular season is pretty special.”With regular defensemen Jonas Brodin, Jake Middleton and now Zach Bogosian all missing due to injury, and Zeev Buium now playing for Vancouver, Kiersted was back on the ice at Grand Casino Arena on Tuesday versus the Capitals.While he never made it to St. Paul on a state tournament team, he had played at the Wild’s home rink as a freshman at North Dakota, where he played four years. Saturday’s game versus Ottawa was actually his 40th on a NHL roster, having played the previous five seasons in the Florida Panthers organization, although he was not on their roster for either of the team’s runs to the Stanley Cup in 2024 or 2025.Over the summer, he signed a two-year deal with the Wild worth $1.55 million and after being sent down during training camp, he notched three assists in 23 games with the Iowa Wild. title: Cameron Green breaks IPL overseas record
content: Cameron Green became the highest priced overseas player in IPL history, bought by Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) for INR 25.20 crore (AU$4.2 million approx). At Tuesday's player auction for the 2026 season the Australia all-rounder was the subject of intense bidding between KKR and Chennai Super Kings (CSK) before being purchased by the three-time champions. Green became the ​third most expensive ‌IPL player overall, after India internationals Rishabh Pant (AU$4.46m) and Shreyas Iyer (AU$4.42m). His earnings are capped at just under AU$3 million under a new IPL regulation with the rest of the money paid by KKR going to the BCCI to support player welfare. Green received the news of his lucrative signing while preparing for the third Test against England starting on Wednesday. But Steven Smith headed a list of Australians who went unsold, in his case he did not even come up for offer with none of the teams requesting to bid on him. Unlike Green, whose deal was one of the first completed, Josh Inglis had to wait until approaching 2am Adelaide time to discover his fate. Smith's fruitless wait was even longer. "He adds lot to our team, especially with our new power coach Andre Russell, very nice to have a young allrounder," said KKR's CEO Venky Mysore of Green. "Him having had IPL experience, we know what he does with bat and ball. Couldn't be happier." Green previously played for Mumbai Indians (MI) and ​Royal ​Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) but ​missed the 2025 season ​after back...

title: Tom Silvagni to learn fate after raping woman
content: The son of AFL great Stephen Silvagni has been jailed for more than six years for raping a woman and then forging a rideshare receipt in an attempt to cover it up. Tom Silvagni, 23, looked straight ahead on the video link from prison as Victorian County Court Judge Gregory Lyon handed down his sentence on Wednesday morning. His parents Stephen and Jo, who were in the courtroom, did not react to the jail term. Silvagni denied he digitally raped his friend's girlfriend at his Melbourne home in the early hours of January 14, 2024. The woman had consensual sex with her boyfriend at the house but then he organised an Uber and left the property shortly before 2am. Silvagni then lied, telling the woman her boyfriend would be returning upstairs because his Uber had been cancelled. But it was Silvagni who went into the dark bedroom a short time later and pretended to be the woman's boyfriend before digitally raping her twice. In the days after, he doctored an Uber receipt to make it look like the victim's boyfriend had left the house after 2.30am. Silvagni admitted forging the receipt but said he did so because he panicked after being falsely accused of rape. But a County Court jury rejected his story, finding him guilty of two counts of rape on December 5. Judge Lyon described the offending as egregious and callous as he jailed Silvagni for six years and two months. He will be eligible for parole after three years and three months. 1800 RESPECT (1800 737 732) National Sexual Abuse...

title: Vermittlungsausschuss: Kassen dringen auf Einigung für Ausgabenbremse
content: Die Bundesregierung will möglichst verhindern, dass die Krankenversicherung Anfang 2026 noch teurer wird. Kommt dafür ein Kompromiss in letzter Minute zustande?Die gesetzlichen Krankenkassen mahnen Bund und Länder zu einer Verständigung für eine geplante Ausgabenbremse, um den Druck für erneute Beitragserhöhungen im neuen Jahr zu vermindern. Der Chef des Spitzenverbands, Oliver Blatt, sagte der Deutschen Presse-Agentur: "Der Vermittlungsausschuss muss jetzt liefern, da der Anstieg der Zusatzbeiträge sonst noch stärker wird als ohnehin schon erwartet." Leidtragende einer Nicht-Einigung wären die Versicherten, deren Arbeitgeber und die Wirtschaft.Der Vermittlungsausschuss von Bundestag und Bundesrat berät heute über ein Spargesetz, das die Länderkammer im November vorerst gestoppt hat. Der Widerstand richtet sich gegen Einsparungen von 1,8 Milliarden Euro bei den Krankenhäusern, die den Großteil des Sparpakets von insgesamt zwei Milliarden Euro ausmachen sollen. Die Länder kritisieren dies als einseitig und befürchten nachteilige Folgen für die Finanzen der Kliniken über das nächste Jahr hinaus.Konkret soll nach dem Gesetz von Gesundheitsministerin Nina Warken (CDU) der Anstieg der Vergütungen 2026 auf die tatsächlichen Kostensteigerungen begrenzt werden. Das soll dazu beitragen, die Zusatzbeiträge der Kassen zum 1. Januar 2026 zu stabilisieren. Für einen Kompromiss drängt die Zeit, wenn er in der letzten Bundesratssitzung des Jahres am Freitag...

title: Thời tiết hôm nay 17-12: Miền Bắc rét, Quảng Trị đến Đắk Lắk có nơi mưa to, miền Nam nắng
content: Trung tâm Dự báo khí tượng thủy văn quốc gia cho biết hôm nay 17-12, thời tiết Bắc Bộ và Bắc Trung Bộ mưa rào rải rác và dông. Trời rét, vùng núi Bắc Bộ có nơi rét đậm. Từ Quảng Trị đến TP Đà Nẵng và phía đông các tỉnh từ Quảng Ngãi đến Đắk Lắk mưa vừa và dông, có nơi mưa to. Phía bắc đêm và sáng trời rét, phía nam đêm trời lạnh. Lượng mưa phổ biến từ 10-30mm, có nơi mưa to trên 70mm. Trong mưa dông khả năng có lốc, sét, mưa đá và gió giật mạnh. Mưa lớn cục bộ khả năng gây lũ quét trên các sông, suối nhỏ, sạt lở đất trên sườn dốc và ngập úng tại vùng trũng, thấp. Nam Bộ và các khu vực khác ngày nắng, chiều tối vài nơi mưa dông. Trong mưa dông khả năng có lốc, sét và gió giật mạnh. Trên biển, khu vực bắc Biển Đông, bao gồm đặc khu Hoàng Sa có gió đông bắc mạnh cấp 6, riêng phía đông cấp 6-7, giật cấp 8-9. Biển động mạnh, sóng biển cao từ 3 - 5m. Vùng biển từ Khánh Hòa đến Cà Mau và vùng biển phía tây khu vực nam Biển Đông, bao gồm vùng biển phía tây đặc khu Trường Sa có gió đông bắc mạnh cấp 6, giật cấp 7-8, biển động, sóng biển cao từ 2 - 3m. Trong ngày 17-12, phía bắc khu vực giữa Biển Đông có gió đông bắc mạnh cấp 6, giật cấp 7-8; biển động, sóng biển cao từ 2...

title: Os votos de Ancelotti e Marquinhos no The Best
content: Ousmane Dembélé venceu o 'The Best' e foi eleito o melhor jogador do mundo na temporada . A premiação, organizada pela Fifa, teve votação popular e também de alguns representantes oficiais de cada país. Pelo Brasil, por exemplo, votaram o técnico da seleção, Carlo Ancelotti, além de Marquinhos, capitão da equipe. Relacionado Com Dembélé melhor do mundo, veja todos os vencedores e vencedoras do Fifa The Best de 2025 ESPN.com.br Raphinha recebe 17 votos para melhor jogador do mundo no The Best da Fifa; veja quem votou ESPN.com.br Fifa The Best: Luis Enrique e Sarina Wiegman são eleitos técnicos do ano ESPN.com.br E segundo os dois, o prêmio dado ao francês do Paris Saint-Germain foi justo, já que ambos o colocaram na primeira colocação em seus votos. Eles também concordaram na segunda colocação, ao elegerem Raphinha , que teve ótimos números no Barcelona , e também na seleção. Nesse caso, eles foram votos vencidos, já que o brasileiro sequer apareceu na seleção ideal da temporada. Ancelotti e Marquinhos discordaram apenas na 3a posição. Enquanto o técnico italiano votou em Kylian Mbappé , que foi seu comandado no Real Madrid , o zagueiro escolheu Achraf Hakimi, que é seu companheiro no PSG .

content: O Chelsea venceu o Cardiff City , da terceira divisão da Inglaterra, por 3 a 1, nesta terça-feira (16), no País de Gales, e avançou às semifinais da Copa da Liga Inglesa . Sem Estêvão , que sequer foi relacionado para o duelo, outro dois brasileiros brilharam: Andrey Santos e João Pedro deram assistências. Garnacho (duas vezes) e Pedro Neto marcaram para os Blues , enquanto Turnbull descontou. Além da equipe de Enzo Maresca, Manchester City , Newcastle e Arsenal também estão na disputa, o que pode garantir uma semifinal com grandes jogos entre times da Premier League . Pentacampeão da competição, o Chelsea tenta dar fim a um longo jejum de uma década na Copa da Liga Inglesa, já que a última conquista foi na temporada 2014/15. O jogo Contrariando o que muitos pensavam, o Cardiff foi superior ao Chelsea. Ao menos no primeiro tempo. O time da casa criou as melhores chances, mas nenhuma também com muito perigo. title: 14-årige Vanessa blev sendt til Somalia, fordi hun var for dansk – genopdragelsesrejser skal stoppes
content: Morten Messerschmidt Jeg har på det seneste fulgt historien om Vanessa Andersen, og den er rystende. Og desværre er den ikke enestående. Som 14 årig blev Vanessa sendt ud af Danmark under påskud af en familietur. I stedet blev hun frataget sin frihed, sit hår, sin telefon og sit liv, som hun kendte det. Hun blev udsat for vold, afstraffelse og religiøs tvang på en såkaldt genopdragelsesrejse i Somalia. I dag lever hun med angst, mareridt og dybe ar på sjælen. Det her er ikke kultur. Det er overgreb. At forældre sender deres børn ud af Danmark for at blive gjort mindre danske, mindre frie og mindre vestlige, er dybt forkert. I Danmark har vi valgt, at børn har rettigheder, og at frihed, ligestilling og tryghed ikke er til forhandling. Hvis man som forælder ikke ønsker, at ens børn skal vokse op med danske værdier, dansk frihed og danske rettigheder, så er løsningen ikke at sende børnene ud af landet. For når vi giver ophold i Danmark, følger der et ansvar med. Et ansvar for at respektere vores love, vores frihed og vores børns rettigheder. Hvis man ikke vil eller kan det, så hører man ikke hjemme her. Ingen forældre skal kunne tvinge deres børn til at blive fjernet fra det danske samfund og udsættes for vold og tvang i udlandet. Genopdragelsesrejser er et svigt af børnene, og et svigt af de værdier, Danmark bygger på. Vi skal sætte en stopper for genopdragelsesrejser. Vi skal beskytte piger som Vanessa. Og vi skal turde sige klart, at i Danmark står barnets...
creator: Morten Messerschmidt

title: Forsøgte at voldtage en lille pige: To mænd idømt forvaring for overgreb og vold mod børn
content: Redaktionen Retten i Holstebro har tirsdag fundet to mænd og en kvinde skyldige i en sag om seksuelle overgreb mod børn samt vold mod børn og deling af overgrebsmateriale med børn. En 38-årig mand og en 46-årig mand er begge blevet idømt forvaring for deres roller i sagen, medens en 37-årig kvindelig medhjælper blev idømt tre måneders ubetinget fængsel for sin rolle i sagen. Anklageskriftet i den omfattende sag indeholdt i alt 33 forhold. Forsøg på voldtægt af lille pige Den 38-årige er blandt andet dømt for forsøg på voldtægt af en lille pige samt en voldtægt ved andet seksuelt forhold end samleje af barnet. Den 46-årige mand er blandt andet dømt for via tekstbeskeder at have planlagt, tilskyndet og opfordret den 38-årige til at begå overgrebene, filme dem og efterfølgende dele overgrebsmateriale via beskedtjenesten Telegram. De to mænd blev blandt andet også dømt for besiddelse af overgrebsmateriale med børn. Flere tusinde fotos og videoer Den 38-årige mand er dømt for besiddelse af flere tusinde fotos og videoer. Heraf en del fotografier og videoer i kategori 3, som er den groveste kategori af overgrebsmateriale. Den 46-årig mand blev ligeledes dømt for at være i besiddelse af mere end tusinde billeder med seksuelt materiale med børn herunder en del billeder i kategori 3, som blev fundet på deres mobiltelefoner. Den 37-årig kvinde blev idømt tre måneders ubetinget fængsel i samme sag for medvirken til vold og for at have delt et seksuelt billede....
creator: Redaktionen

title: 39-årig mand mishandlede to kærester – så fik dommeren nok
content: Redaktionen En 39-årig mand fra Tønder blev tirsdag ved Retten i Sønderborg idømt fem års fængsel for omfattende overgreb mod to kvinder, som han var kæreste med. Den 39-årige blev desuden dømt til at betale 350.000 kroner i erstatning til de to kvinder. En i dag 27-årig kvinde blev i perioden fra juli 2018 til februar 2022 udsat for voldtægt, voldtægt ved andet seksuelt forhold end samleje, vold, psykisk vold og vidnetrusler. Ligeledes blev en i dag 23-årig kvinde i perioderne fra januar til august 2023 og fra november 2024 til april 2025 blev udsat for voldtægt, voldtægt ved andet seksuelt forhold end samleje samt psykisk vold. Lang periode med social kontrol og overgreb Retten lagde i sin strafudmåling vægt på den lange gerningsperiode, at den 39-årige har isoleret kvinderne, og at kvinderne har været udsat for omfattende social kontrol og overgreb. Retten har i denne sammenhæng også lagt vægt på lighederne i overgrebene begået mod de to kvinder. Tilfreds med dommen Anklagerfuldmægtig Thomas Bøjgaard fra Anklagemyndigheden i Syd- & Sønderjylland er tilfreds med rettens dom, der afspejler forholdenes grovhed og den langvarige periode, de seksuelle overgreb har strakt sig over. ”Retten har med dommen i det store hele lagt de forurettedes forklaringer til grund og dermed fundet forklaringerne troværdige,” fastslår Thomas Bøjgaard og fortsætter; ” Der er ingen tvivl om, at det, kvinderne har levet under, har været voldsomt krænkende, og det synes jeg, at straffen...

title: Nu taler politikere pludselig om at opsige eller justere konventionerne for at sende udlændinge ud af Danmark – men det vigtigste tager de ikke fat på
content: Britta Mogensen Det har vakt betydelig røre, at Venstres leder, Troels Lund Poulsen , mener, at Statsborgerretskonventionen bør opsiges eller i hvert fald justeres. Konventionens formål fremgår af Kapitel 1, Artikel 1: ”Denne konvention fastlægger principper og regler for fysiske personers statsborgerret samt regler vedrørende værnepligten i tilfælde af dobbelt statsborgerret, som de kontraherende staters nationale lovgivning skal være i overensstemmelse med.” Alle de oprørte kan godt slå koldt vand i blodet, for hvad en sådan opsigelse vil komme til at betyde i praksis er nok et spørgsmål. Konventionerne er så indfiltret i hinanden, at de enkelte artikler i en konvention også vil kunne ses i en anden konvention. Det nytter derfor ikke at opsige én konvention, da der er andre konventioner, hvor bordet fanger. Allerede i konventionens præambel anføres, at deltagerlandene ”anerkender retten til respekt for familieliv, som fastsat i artikel 8 i konventionen til beskyttelse af menneskerettigheder og grundlæggende frihedsrettigheder” (står i Menneskerettighedskonventionen). Artikel 8, stk. 2 er dog udeladt her: ”Ingen offentlig myndighed kan gøre indgreb i udøvelsen af denne ret, undtagen for så vidt det sker i overensstemmelse med loven og er nødvendigt i et demokratisk samfund af hensyn til den nationale sikkerhed, den offentlige tryghed eller landets økonomiske velfærd, for at forebygge uro eller forbrydelse, for at beskytte sundheden eller sædeligheden eller for at...
creator: Britta Mogensen

title: Dyrenes Beskyttelse kræver bedre dokumentation i dyrevelfærdskontrollen: ”Det er for let at skjule svigt af grise”
content: DYRENES BESKYTTELSE Efter TV 2’s afsløringer af grove svigt af grise på en række landbrugsbesætninger opfordrer Dyrenes Beskyttelse nu regeringen til straks at styrke dokumentationen i dyrevelfærdskontrollen. Dyreværnsorganisationen kræver ovenpå afsløringerne i TV 2-dokumentaren Hvem passer på grisene? politiske tiltag, der sikrer, at kontrollen ikke længere kan omgås, manipuleres eller udhules. – Dokumentaren giver et unikt og afslørende billede af den barske virkelighed for grisene i industrilandbruget. Det er et syn, som danskerne ikke tåler synet af, og som vi ved, at producenterne i vidt omfang lykkes med at skjule fra kontrolmyndighederne. Derfor foreslår vi en markant styrkelse af dokumentationen, som myndighederne har adgang til i forbindelse med kontrollen, siger Birgitte Iversen Damm, dyrlæge og chefkonsulent for landbrugsdyr hos Dyrenes Beskyttelse. Dyrenes Beskyttelse foreslår derfor indført en model for fuldt dokumenteret svineproduktion, der kan give myndighederne et langt stærkere grundlag for både at opdage og forebygge lovbrud. Modellen bygger på et velafprøvet princip fra fiskeriet, hvor fuldt dokumenteret fiskeri bruges til at skabe gennemsigtighed og sikre, at reglerne overholdes. – Vi ved fra både vores egne politianmeldelser, kontrollerende dyrlæger og whistleblowere fra landbruget, at problemerne i svineproduktionen er langt større, end den nuværende kontrol formår at opfange. På trods af det, har dyrevelfærdskontrollen i årevis haft en...
creator: Redaktionen

title: Por qué la amortiguación define tu experiencia al correr
content: ERP. Entender la importancia de la amortiguación en zapatillas es clave. Comprender este concepto técnico te permitirá tomar decisiones más informadas sobre el calzado que mejor se adapta a tus necesidades. La elección correcta influye en tu comodidad, así como en tu capacidad para prevenir lesiones y optimizar cada kilómetro. Si estás buscando opciones especializadas que combinen tecnología avanzada y diseño funcional, explorar The Drop Zone te conectará con alternativas que priorizan tanto el rendimiento como la protección articular. Antes de buscar tus zapatillas favoritas en The Drop Zone Perú , es esencial entender qué es la amortiguación. Este concepto se refiere a la capacidad del calzado para absorber y dispersar las fuerzas de impacto que se producen al correr. Cada vez que el pie contacta con el suelo, se genera una fuerza que, sin una adecuada absorción, puede causar estrés en las articulaciones y tejidos musculares. Este proceso invisible determina cómo tu cuerpo procesa miles de impactos durante cada sesión de entrenamiento. La amortiguación actúa como un sistema de protección que resguarda articulaciones, tendones y músculos de las fuerzas repetitivas generadas al correr. Sin este sistema, los corredores podrían experimentar dolores y lesiones debido a la exposición constante al impacto en superficies duras. El cuerpo humano posee mecanismos naturales de absorción, pero la tecnología moderna en calzado deportivo complementa y potencia...

title: [의학칼럼] 담석증, 꼭 수술을 해야 하는가요?
content: 박성균 대구 강남종합병원 간담췌외과 원장 간담췌외과 전문의가 말하는 '지켜봐도 되는 경우' 와 '미루면 위험한 경우' 가 있다. 최근 국가검진과 일반검진을 많이 접한 환자분들이 증가추세에 있다. 건강검진을 하다보면 CT(Computed Tomography) 또는 복부초음파(abdominal ultrasonography)를 통해 검사결과 설명 당시에 담석이 있다는 말을 주변에서 종종 들거나 경험 하신 분들이 많을 거라고 생각한다. 그럼 대부분의 환자분들은 "당장 수술해야 하나요?", "아프지는 않은데 그냥 놔둬도 되나요?" 라는 질문을 가장 많이 한다. 결론부터 말하자면 담석이 있다고 모두 수술이 필요한 것은 아니다. 하지만 반대로, 수술 시기를 놓치면 응급상황으로 이어질 수 있는 경우도 분명히 존재 한다. 증상이 없는 담석은 꼭 수술을 할 필요는 없다. 담낭 안에 돌이 있다고 해도 복통이 없다거나, 평소 소화불량이나 메스꺼움이 없거나, 담낭염 소견이 없다면 대부분은 정기적인 추적 관찰만으로도 충분하다. 실제로 무증상 담석은 평생 아무 문제없이 지내는 경우도 많다. 이 경우에는 대부분 무조건 수술을 권하지 않는다. 하지만 다음과 같은 증상이 반복된다면 수술을 고려해야 한다. 첫 번째, 오른쪽 윗배, 명치, 우측 옆구리 등의 부위에서 통증이 반복적으로 발생한다. 두 번째, 기름진 음식을 먹은 뒤 소화불량, 오심, 구토가 (위장질환과 유사한 증상) 있다. 세 번째, 통증이 어깨나 등 쪽으로 퍼진다. 네 번째, 열이 나거나, 통증이...
creator: 외부필진 jebo@imaeil.com

title: [의학산책] 요요를 막는 법, 칼로리보다 '습관 구조'를 바꾸자
content: 대구 일민의료재단 세강병원 김성호 원장 체중 감량보다 더 어려운 것은 '유지'다. 섭취를 줄이면 몸은 에너지 소비를 낮추고 식욕을 끌어올리며 다시 원래 체중으로 돌아가려 한다. 실제 해외 대규모 추적 연구들에 따르면 감량된 체중의 절반 이상이 2년 안에, 80% 이상이 5년 내 되돌아온다. 요요는 실패가 아니라 우리 몸의 정상적인 방어 반응에 가깝다. 그렇다면 해법은 무엇일까. 답은 단순하다. 목표는 '크고 빠르게'가 아니라 '적당하고 지속 가능하게'다. 체중 관리는 칼로리를 계산하는 기술이 아니라, 생활 루틴을 바꾸는 설계에 가깝다. 매 끼니 단백질을 25~30g 먼저 챙기고, 탄수화물은 평소의 80%로 줄이는 것만으로도 포만감과 섭취량은 안정된다. 운동 역시 주 5일 고강도보다, 출퇴근 걷기, 계단 오르기처럼 일상 속 활동을 꾸준히 쌓는 편이 훨씬 오래간다. 수면은 체중 관리의 숨은 핵심이다. 일정한 취침·기상 시간, 자기 전 조도 낮추기, 전자기기 사용 줄이기 같은 기본 수면 습관은 식욕 호르몬의 균형을 바로잡아 폭식과 야식을 줄이는 데 결정적이다. 평일 리듬이 자주 무너지는 직장인이라면 '퇴근 후 10분 걷기'처럼 작고 고정된 행동 하나를 정해두는 것이 좋다. 아침 양치 후 체중을 재고 물 한 컵을 마시는 간단한 루틴, 매주 같은 요일·같은 시간 기록하는 체중과 허리둘레, 주 1회 외식 횟수 설정 같은 작은 자동화가 "망했으면 포기"라는 극단적 사고를 막는다. 핵심은 노력보다 구조, 의지보다 자동화다....

title: [건강플러스] '조용한 시한폭탄' 뇌동맥류
content: 뇌동맥류 관련 이미지. 게티이미지뱅크 겨울은 혈관 질환에 특히 유의해야 하는 계절이다. 실내외 온도차에 의해 혈관이 갑자기 수축했다가 팽창하게 되면서 혈압도 자주 변하기 때문이다. 평소 뇌동맥류가 있는 사람이라면 혈압의 변화를 뇌혈관이 이기지 못할 경우 뇌동맥류 파열로 이어질 수 있다. 뇌동맥류는 뇌혈관 벽이 약해지면서 뇌동맥이 꽈리처럼 부풀어 오르는 질환으로 '뇌혈관 꽈리'로도 불린다. 이 상태가 위험한 것은 마치 빵빵하게 부풀어오른 풍선처럼 언제 터질지 모르기 때문이다. 만일 뇌동맥류가 파열돼 뇌출혈이 발생하면 생명에도 치명적이며, 치료를 하더라도 후유증이 남는 경우도 많아 파열 전 치료와 위험 요인을 줄이는 것이 중요하다. ◆고혈압 있다면 뇌동맥류 조심해야...증상없어 뇌동맥류는 오래된 고무호스의 약한 부분이 압력을 견디지 못해 볼록하게 튀어나오는 모습과 비슷한데, 문제는 이 '풍선'이 터질 수 있다는 점이다. 뇌동맥류가 파열되면 생명을 위협하는 뇌출혈이 발생한다. 뇌동맥류의 정확한 원인은 아직 완전히 밝혀지지 않았지만, 여러 위험요인들이 알려져 있다. 고혈압이 가장 중요한 위험 요인이며, 흡연, 과도한 음주 등의 생활습관도 영향을 미친다. 주로 40대에서 60대 사이에 흔히 발생하며, 직계가족 중 뇌동맥류 환자가 있다면 발병률은 6~7배 증가한다고 보고된 바 있다. 전체 인구의 약 3~5%가 뇌동맥류를 가지고 있는 것으로 추정되지만, 연간 파열 위험도는 1% 미만으로 비교적 낮다....

title: Çetin Ünsalan'dan Mehmet Şimşek'e program eleştirisi
content: Ekonomist Çetin Ünsalan, Hazine ve Maliye Bakanı Mehmet Şimşek'in ekonomi politikalarına sert eleştiriler yöneltti. Şimşek'in 2026 yılında enflasyonu tek haneye düşürme hedefinin gerçekçi olmadığını savunan Ünsalan, "Ortada bir program yok, yalnızca temenniler manzumesi var" dedi. Türkiye'de hiçbir zaman gerçek anlamda serbest piyasa ekonomisinin uygulanmadığını vurgulayan Ünsalan, etkin denetim ve tam rekabetin olmadığı bir sistemin sert ve kontrolsüz bir kapitalizme dönüştüğünü ifade etti. İhracat verilerinin kamuoyuna yanlış sunulduğunu belirten Ünsalan, "İhracat eldeki ürünü satmak değildir. Akşam yediğiniz domatesi komşuya satıp sonra marketten almak ticaret değildir" sözleriyle mevcut anlayışı eleştirdi. Tarımda pestisit sorununa da değinen Ünsalan, tamamen biyolojik çözüm üreten bir akademik çalışmanın Meclis'te AKP ve MHP oylarıyla reddedildiğini hatırlattı. Faiz yüküne dikkat çeken Ünsalan, 2026 yılında yalnızca faiz için 2,7 trilyon TL ödeneceğini belirterek, "Bu sistem artık yürümüyor" dedi. Asgari ücretin açlık sınırının altında kaldığını vurgulayan Ünsalan, yaşanan yoksulluğun tesadüf değil, tercih edilmiş bir ekonomik düzenin sonucu olduğunu söyledi.
creator: yenimesaj

title: Filmpreise: Deutscher Film und deutsche Talente auf Oscar-Kurs
content: Mitte März werden die Oscars verliehen - jetzt hat der Film "In die Sonne schauen" eine wichtige Hürde genommen. In der Vorauswahl mischen auch andere deutsche Talente mit.Vier Mal in der langen Oscar-Geschichte ging die Trophäe für den besten internationalen Film nach Deutschland. Kommt bei den 98. Academy Awards eine fünfte hinzu? Die Berliner Regisseurin Mascha Schilinski hat jetzt die erste Hürde genommen: Ihr Drama "In die Sonne schauen" schaffte es bei der Oscar-Vorauswahl auf eine Shortlist von 15 Kandidaten für den begehrten Preis.Die Konkurrenz war groß - immerhin hatten sich 86 Länder für 2026 in der Wettbewerbssparte International Feature Film beworben. Bis zum 22. Januar bleibt es spannend: Dann werden von den 15 Kandidaten 5 Filme für die Endrunde nominiert. Die Oscars werden am 15. März in 24 Sparten verliehen - für zwölf Kategorien gab es nun eine Vorauswahl, darunter in Bereichen wie Filmmusik, Sound, Spezialeffekte und Kurzfilme. Deutsche Komponisten auf Oscar-KursDer deutsche Filmkomponist Hans Zimmer kam mit seiner Musik für den Rennsportfilm "F1" im Oscar-Rennen einen Schritt weiter. Er schaffte es auf eine Shortlist von 20 Anwärtern in der Sparte Filmmusik - ebenso wie der in Deutschland geborene britische Komponist Max Richter mit seiner Untermalung des Dramas "Hamnet" von Regisseurin Chloé Zhao. Unter den Anwärtern ist auch der Düsseldorfer Komponist Volker Bertelmann mit seiner Filmmusik für den Thriller "A House of Dynamite" von...

content: "위험하고 치명적인 흉기 사용" [마이데일리 = 곽명동 기자]할리우드의 유명 영화감독 로브 라이너(78)와 그의 아내 미셸 라이너(68)를 흉기로 살해한 혐의를 받고 있는 아들 닉 라이너(32)가 다중 살인이 적용된 1급 살인 2건으로 공식 기소될 예정이다. 로스앤젤레스 카운티 네이선 혹먼 검사장과 짐 맥도널 경찰국장은 16일(현지시간) 기자회견을 열고 수사 진행 상황과 기소 계획을 발표했다. 혹먼 검사장은 "우리는 부모를 살해한 혐의를 받고 있는 닉 라이너의 기소를 발표하기 위해 이 자리에 섰다"고 밝혔다. 이어 "기소 내용에는 다중 살인이라는 특별 가중 사유가 적용된 1급 살인 2건이 포함된다"면서 "또한 칼이라는 위험하고 치명적인 흉기를 사용했다는 특별 혐의도 포함되어 있다"고 덧붙였다. 이 혐의가 유죄로 인정될 경우, 가석방 없는 종신형 또는 사형까지 선고될 수 있다. 다만 혹먼 검사장은 "현재로서는 사형 구형 여부에 대해 어떤 결정도 내려지지 않았다"고 선을 그었다. 현재 닉 라이너는 보석 없이 구금된 상태로 의료 적합성 심사를 받고 있으며, 이후 법원에 출석해 정식 기소 절차를 밟게 될 예정이다. 사건 발생과 현장 발견 앞서 지난 14일 오후, 로브 라이너와 미셸 라이너 부부는 로스앤젤레스 브렌트우드 지역에 위치한 자택에서 흉기에 찔려 숨진 채 발견됐다. 닉 라이너의 여동생인 로미 라이너(28)가 참혹한 현장을 발견하고 신고한 것으로 알려졌다. 라이너 가족은 성명을 통해 "미셸과 로브 라이너의...
